programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world._x000D__x000D__x000D_

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program, relying on global reporting resources, presents in-depth analysis and coverage of major global issues, from a Chinese perspective on international affairs. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling. The program provides a unique platform for the best current affairs documentaries from around the globe. Big Story aims to present the contemporary world and China’s global perspectives on the contemporary world to an international audience.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. The Heat presents tough issues from a comprehensive, balanced and international and Chinese perspective. Guests from on the spot and around the world ensure lively debate and a range of voices. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. Analysts bring Asian perspective to topical and developing issues. Asia Today also emphasizes the diverse cultures and lifestyles of the world’s most populous continent.

programme.title: Leaders Talk
programme.desc: Leaders Talk is China Media Group’s new current affairs program featuring one-on-one interviews with heads of state and high-ranking government officials and heads of international organizations. They will share their insights on the major events shaping today’s world, providing an international viewpoint to understand our times, the visions we share, the challenges we face and the efforts we can make for a better future.

programme.title: Tato Tower Sleepover
programme.desc: Supertato invites Evil Pea to his sleepover, but Carrot is suspicious and vows to stay up all night to make sure she can't unleash any of her evil plans.

programme.title: The Transport Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.title: The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Master of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Café in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: Rain
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Pizza Girls
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.title: Swap Places
programme.desc: The Teletubbies swap places in the Tubby Car and drive to the Hidey Hup. They swap places again on the Tubby Uppy Downy before going up and down.

programme.title: Explorer
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing as they go exploring.

programme.title: The Great Hooperini
programme.desc: Hooper puts on a spectacular magic show. However, with so much to do and so little time, it's unclear if The Great Hooperini can put on a magical performance for everyone to remember.

programme.title: Dog Loves Castaways
programme.desc: Dog and Pug visit a Desert Island where Colin lives on his own. He is very happy by himself but when our friends find him, they have a wonderful meal and play a great game of cricket.

programme.title: A Messy Night Before Christmas
programme.desc: Messy can't wait for Christmas Day to arrive. He learns that everyone needs to get a good night's sleep, even Mother Christmas!

programme.title: A Night At The Circuits
programme.desc: Messy is exploring science questions. He joins his friends in OKIDO on an adventure. They explore the electrical world of circuits to fix Zoe's communicator.

programme.title: Be Brave Bryan
programme.desc: Bryan gets spooked and thinks there's a lake monster lurking in the mists. It'll be Mojo and Bo who have to find the monster... or show Bryan that there's no monster at all!

programme.title: It's time to visit the library
programme.desc: When JoJo runs out of story-books to read, she visits the Library with Gran Gran and gets her own library card! JoJo learns all about the Library and discovers how amazing it is!

programme.title: Music Fixer
programme.desc: Sarah's Tuba is making some very peculiar sounds, so a trip to the Music Shop is in order.

programme.title: Wool on Wheels
programme.desc: Scarf Lady is holding a 'knitted treats' sale in the park, but the weather is causing a problem...

programme.title: Chucklesome Trucks
programme.desc: When Rebecca works with the Troublesome Trucks, everyone expects the worst, but she defies everyone's expectations and has a very amusing day.

programme.title: The Claw
programme.desc: When Bluey and Bingo are unable to grab a prize on a Magic Claw machine, Mum and Dad create their own version at home. But Dad isn't about to make winning easy.

programme.title: Markets
programme.desc: When Bluey visits the markets with five bucks from the tooth fairy, the options are endless. But as she and Indy look for the perfect purchase, spending it proves hard.

programme.title: Blue Mountains
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo, Mum and Dad play a game of hand puppets, exploring the land beyond the Blue Mountains where they outsmart the Cheeky Fox to find the softest ever beds.

programme.title: Chilli to the Rescue
programme.desc: Chilli decides to become a superhero called Super Chilli! His superhero skills are put to the test when Evil Pea covers Supertato in sticky honey. Chilli's heat saves the day.

programme.title: The Library Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels can't figure out if fish have noses, Duggee shows them his library. But when the Squirrels realise no-one is visiting it, they have an idea...

programme.title: Tag's First Day
programme.desc: The Squirrels are crafting in the Clubhouse when Betty saves Tag from throwing water across the table instead of glitter.

programme.title: Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Reese's Filipino Cassava Cake
programme.desc: Cassava cake is a very popular dessert in the Philippines and Reese is making a very special version for her friends to try they when come to visit. It's a family favourite!

programme.title: Fishing Cats
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the tropical island of Sri Lanka in Southern Asia on a global adventure in search of fishing cats.

programme.title: Meet the Pirates
programme.desc: Captain Captain doesn't think her new crew, Sandy and Seaweed, are up to the job. Sandy and Seaweed decide to write a special song all about them in order to persuade Captain Captain that they should remain as her crew.

programme.desc: Amelia is flying around in the toy shop when suddenly she notices the toy flying horse.

programme.desc: Dad and his mates hit the backyard, ready to rip up some tree stumps! But when Bluey and Bingo take over a stump as a nail salon, Dad finds he's got some negotiating to do.

programme.title: 文化大观园
programme.desc: 节目关注中华文化中的大事件、大历史、大人物和新发现，在纷繁的生活中给您清静、雅致的空间，并通过我们的镜头去探寻中华文明中充满迷幻、离奇的人物和故事。

programme.title: 凤凰午间专列 (11/4/26)
programme.desc: 凤凰中午的强档新闻节目，不论国际经贸，社会，财经及政治新闻都第一时间为您送上。

programme.title: 总编辑时间 (10/4/26)
programme.desc: 由凤凰卫视资深评论员重点编选和剖析一天世界最值得注意的头条新闻，解构事情的来龙去脉和对日后发展的重要性，让观众可以深度了解一天的重点事项。

programme.title: 香港新视点
programme.desc: 《香港新视点》为观众详细讲解基本法的历史基础、演进过程，包括基本法的内容介绍、政改、内交与国际关系以及金融发展方向等多个方面。

programme.title: 我的香港故事
programme.desc: 以自述的方式讲述普通香港人的故事，反映他们普通却独到的闪光之处。

programme.title: 我的香港故事
programme.desc: 以自述的方式讲述普通香港人的故事，反映他们普通却独到的闪光之处。

programme.title: 凤凰大视野
programme.desc: 凤凰卫视力求创新，不为人后，推出凤凰大视野一系列主题性纪录片节目，每周连续播出某一专题，或是社会焦点、或是历史纪念日、或特别行动、独家内幕透析时代局势，一气呵成五集持续播出。

programme.title: 凤凰正点播报 (11/4/26)
programme.desc: 每天从零点到零点，《凤凰正点播报》为您循环不息地追踪全球各个角落、各个领域最有价值、新鲜热辣的新闻大事。第一时间让您知道天下事的最新发展。

programme.title: 空间观策
programme.desc: 演播室战略评论类栏目，每周聚焦一个热点，使用卫星地图作为演示手段，由擅长军事的评论员宋忠平深入分析大国战略。利用卫星图片解读大国战略。该栏目将采取凤凰网直播方式，以网友互动贯穿全过程。

programme.title: 纪录大时代
programme.desc: 联合中国各顶级卫视及电视制作机构，汇聚优秀精品纪录片集中展映。

programme.title: 近观中国
programme.desc: 节目每期以一名外国人为主角，游走中国各地，以其视角近距离观察中国社会现状和中国人的生活。

programme.title: 筑梦天下
programme.desc: 荟萃中外历史建筑，赏析现代经典设计；寻访民居风俗故事，分享另类家居理念。

programme.title: 凤凰焦点新闻 (11/4/26)
programme.desc: 《凤凰焦点新闻》准时、及时、简明、迅速地为您追踪全球各个角落最有价值、新鲜热辣的新闻大事。

programme.title: 新闻今日谈 (11/4/26)

programme.title: 30s Glam vs. 60s Cool, Florida
programme.desc: A design-obsessed couple battles over Mediterranean glam or midcentury cool in St. Petersburg, Florida.

programme.title: The Classic Detroit House
programme.desc: Keith and Evan tackle a decrepit 1920s house with original details and hidden charm. Keith combines old and new to create a city-chic throwback home.

programme.title: From Ugly To Glamorous
programme.desc: The road trip comes to an end as Retta reveals the winner of Ugliest House in America! The winning house receives a $150,000 renovation.

programme.title: Dome Sweet Dome
programme.desc: Ben and Cristi bring function and style to couple's artist-built dome house and turn it into the hangout spot of their dreams.

programme.title: Bittersweet Sale
programme.desc: After learning that a member of their team needs to sell her house in a hurry, Lyndsay and Leslie jump into action, promising to forgo any profit.

programme.title: Episode 10
programme.desc: Jack visits a sci-fi-inspired smart home with a high-tech glow. Next, he explores an earth home built into the hillside with mid-century vibes.

programme.title: Hot Mess Midwest
programme.desc: A concrete cave better suited for children, a former bank and an outdated brick house that looks like a pizza place compete for a $150,000 makeover.

programme.title: Transforming Thomaston
programme.desc: Brian and Mika Kleinschmidt have big plans to help Thomaston, Georgia, by transforming an iconic drive-in restaurant into a must-see destination.

programme.title: Analysis Paralysis
programme.desc: Alison's third client has a huge, dated home with flow issues, but the couple struggles to make any decisions on the reno plans.

programme.title: Hostel Makeover
programme.desc: In Flagstaff, AZ, Lindsey takes on a motel that used to be a hostel. She leans into the communal aspects of the property to appeal to guests.

programme.title: Episode 9
programme.desc: Jack continues his hunt for wild homes, beginning with a trio of wooden geodesic domes. Next, he tours a home that’s top to bottom marble.

programme.title: Lakehouse Lost In The 1960s
programme.desc: Chip and Jo go big, reviving a lakehouse estate stuck in the 1960s. It requires overhauling the floorplan and blending two distinct design styles.

programme.title: Big Bucks In Boca Raton
programme.desc: With a few windfalls in their pockets, a couple calls on David Bromstad yet again to find their third dream home in Boca Raton, Florida.

programme.title: Maximum Cringe
programme.desc: Life is full of awkward, cringe-worthy fails that we would prefer to forget, but you can't bury the memory when the camera catches it all.

programme.title: 两岸大视野

programme.title: 全民星攻略

programme.title: 请问今晚住谁家

programme.title: 进击的台湾

programme.title: 小姐不熙娣
programme.desc: 由娱乐圈最具女王气势之艺人小S徐熙娣主持，搭档幽默风趣的助理主持人派翠克，每集邀请多位时下最红、最具话题性之艺人及网红上节目，透过小S深厚及麻辣的主持功力，与现场来宾激荡出无敌之「笑果」。

programme.title: 台湾启示录

programme.title: 打卡吧!我的炫FOOD日记
programme.desc: 由主持人以行脚的方式，主题式的造访各地，以时下年轻人最时兴的FB及IG打卡，创造新亮点及网路点击率，不只美食，也深度介绍各地人文风情与节日祭典等。

programme.title: Pain And Punishment
programme.desc: The twisted origin stories of some of history's most diabolically creative, and brutal, torture devices-from the Iron Maiden to the pear of anguish.

programme.title: Thirst Trap
programme.desc: The Karoo Desert's heat and lack of shade continue to force the survivalists to focus on water or risk dehydration. Some participants get creative in stockpiling this life-saving resource.

programme.title: Pawntourage
programme.desc: Things go nuclear when a Japanese Godzilla toy hits the counter. Can Corey come out on top before he's crushed? Chum does battle over a leather jacket from WWII, but will his offer bomb?

programme.title: Outlandish Ideas
programme.desc: From a coastal cleanup plan that ends with an earth-shaking surprise to a fugitive's fiery fix for an unexpected problem, these are the real-life moments when people thought way outside the box.

programme.title: Where the Wild Restaurants Are

programme.title: The Plate Outdoors

programme.title: DARI AKI BUAT KAMU
programme.desc: Pandu and Tita have been dating since college, but even after graduating, Tita is too scared to introduce Pandu to her family. Her parents strictly forbid her from dating because her late grandfather had already arranged for her to marry another man.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Rayuanmu Tak Semanis Durianku
programme.desc: Pressure is on for Bastian (Masaji Wijayanto) when his father demands he introduce a girlfriend. Desperate, he asks Gea (Ina Marika) to be his fake partner. Gea agrees, but with one smelly condition: Bastian must help her sell durians-the one fruit he absolutely detests.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: DISERUDUK CINTA KONGLOMERAT KW
programme.desc: To help her fussy younger brother, Sarah (Angelica Simperler) heads to a village to find her former helper, Bi Ijah. On the way, she nearly hits a runaway sheep belonging to Gilang (Ridho Ilahi). Since Gilang is Bi Ijah's son, he lets the incident slide. Seeing an opportunity to escape an arranged marriage, Sarah suddenly asks Gilang to pose as a fake billionaire.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Kita Yang Kampung Tapi Semesta Mendukung
programme.desc: Jali (Kenny Austin) is a handsome young man with a secret: he hasn't been circumcised. Worried about his son’s future, his father, Babe Hai, comes up with a desperate plan to tie Jali to his bed and calls for a doctor. Enter Nadia (Jennifer Eve), a beautiful young doctor new to the village health clinic. Her presence causes a sensation, and she quickly goes viral, leading to a crowd of local men suddenly faking illnesses just to get a check-up from her.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cintaku Menyala Terus Gak Perlu Digas
programme.desc: A traumatic high school fire inspired Lista (Larasati Nugroho) to become a firefighter, all while secretly searching for the hero who saved her that day. During a rescue mission, Lista saves a young boy named Angga, who turns out to be the son of Gara (Ridho Illahi). When Gara reveals that he used to be a firefighter himself, Lista begins to wonder if she has finally found the person she’s been looking for.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta

programme.title: DARI PADA DICUBIT IGUANA, LEBIH BAIK DICUBIT KAMU
programme.desc: To pursue her dream of becoming a singer, Pipit (Larasati Nugroho) always performs wearing a mask. Not only is she shy, but her father also forbids her from entering the music industry. At campus, Pipit-who works as a duck herder-is constantly bullied by everyone except for Feri (Ridho Ilahi).

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cuma Mau Bilang, Tipis Tipis Kep!
programme.desc: Seeking revenge on her ex, Rendy (Eduard Sidik), Violla successfully ruins his event with the help of a man she hired as her fake boyfriend. However, the plan backfires in a sweet way as Violla finds herself becoming genuinely attached to Tristan (Fendy Chow), her 'rented' partner.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Sampahnya Dipungut Perasaanku Keangkut
programme.desc: Hana (Shanice Margaretha) works hard as a garbage collector, driving a three-wheeled motor cart every day. Her life changes when she bravely saves a young girl named Chika (Firzanah Alya) from a kidnapping attempt. Grateful for her bravery, Chika’s wealthy father, Adit (Fendy Chow), immediately hires Hana to be his daughter's full-time nanny.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mba Chicken Wings Senyumnya Sederhana Tapi Bikin Warga Marah
programme.desc: Desperate to escape an arranged marriage with Kelvin, Dinda (Jennifer Eve) runs away from home. While being chased by her father’s men, she spots an open car and hides inside. Little does she know, the car belongs to Baim (El Ryan Carlen), who happens to be Kelvin's best friend. Now, Dinda must navigate her feelings while staying hidden from those searching for her.

programme.title: Status Palsu Cintamu Menyala Abangkuh
programme.desc: Radit (Fendy Chow) runs away from home and is chased by his brother. Radit accidentally entered Rhea's (Yuriska Patricia) room to hide. Rhea, who was holding an engagement at her house, suddenly entered the room and shouted to see Radit.

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(畲诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 灵戏逼人
programme.desc: 流行曲音乐人丁一骏(张振朗饰)不时被恶梦缠扰，及后卷入抄袭丑闻，遂搬到小村暂住兼散心。一骏无意间打开村屋内的大戏旧衣箱，放出花旦女鬼云柳芳(龚嘉欣饰)。柳芳本为九十年代的粤剧花旦，却因意外离世。柳芳失去了生前的大部份记忆，一心只想寻回昔日意中人曲行云。一骏为助柳芳了结心愿，答应帮忙，一人一鬼于相处过程中互相扶持，渐生情愫……怎料有人得悉柳芳鬼魂之事，惟恐她当年的死亡真相曝光，决定不择手段亦要掩饰一切……

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 银楼金粉
programme.desc: 广东佛山第一大银楼『尚银楼』面临生意危机，大老爷尚铿(秦沛)为取得沈家借贷，不惜与正室赛小蝶(薛家燕)施计强逼二少爷尚鋆(伍卫国)与沈家千金沈咏彤(杨婉仪)成亲，令鋆的意中人程秀杏(伍咏薇)一怒之下嫁入尚家做叁姨太。鋆从此与铿反目成仇，远渡重洋，兄弟不相往还。直至老太爷大寿那天，鋆始肯回家，但小儿子突遭绑架，铿不愿交出赎金，令兄弟再起冲突，鋆决意分家。_x000D__x000D_另方面，自鋆回来后，一直被铿冷落的杏面对着二叔深感痛苦，又被诬告害至四姨太霏霏(胡定欣)小产，杏痛定思痛向尚家进行报复，利用鋆之余情，暗中撩弄尚家上下，又揭发近身丫环秋菊(杨思琦)原是铿与有夫之妇留下的孽种，连串打击令一代豪门声名狼藉，万劫不复......

programme.title: 香港爱情故事
programme.desc: 暖男设计师陈子朗(罗天宇饰)与理想主义女友邱凯琪(龚嘉欣饰)，是香港典型因土地问题而被迫流离浪荡的情侣。子朗两位妹妹陈子欣(王敏奕饰)和陈子婷(游嘉欣饰)性格极端，摄影师子欣沉沦于艺术家纪家希(谢东闵饰)的失乐园；品学兼优的大学女神子婷，爱之初体验以现实先行，两姐妹各有恋事。子朗、凯琪为觅安乐窝打拼，新婚后居于百多呎的劏房，除了要面对空间不足的生活磨擦外，还要处理双方父母的暮年感情危机！小两口排除万难，置业美梦却一夜变噩梦，为了一层楼竟忘记如何好好恋爱……_x000D_

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.desc: 暖男设计师陈子朗(罗天宇饰)与理想主义女友邱凯琪(龚嘉欣饰)，是香港典型因土地问题而被迫流离浪荡的情侣。子朗两位妹妹陈子欣(王敏奕饰)和陈子婷(游嘉欣饰)性格极端，摄影师子欣沉沦于艺术家纪家希(谢东闵饰)的失乐园；品学兼优的大学女神子婷，爱之初体验以现实先行，两姐妹各有恋事。子朗、凯琪为觅安乐窝打拼，新婚后居于百多呎的劏房，除了要面对空间不足的生活磨擦外，还要处理双方父母的暮年感情危机！小两口排除万难，置业美梦却一夜变噩梦，为了一层楼竟忘记如何好好恋爱……_x000D_

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 银楼金粉
programme.desc: 广东佛山第一大银楼『尚银楼』面临生意危机，大老爷尚铿(秦沛)为取得沈家借贷，不惜与正室赛小蝶(薛家燕)施计强逼二少爷尚鋆(伍卫国)与沈家千金沈咏彤(杨婉仪)成亲，令鋆的意中人程秀杏(伍咏薇)一怒之下嫁入尚家做叁姨太。鋆从此与铿反目成仇，远渡重洋，兄弟不相往还。直至老太爷大寿那天，鋆始肯回家，但小儿子突遭绑架，铿不愿交出赎金，令兄弟再起冲突，鋆决意分家。_x000D__x000D_另方面，自鋆回来后，一直被铿冷落的杏面对着二叔深感痛苦，又被诬告害至四姨太霏霏(胡定欣)小产，杏痛定思痛向尚家进行报复，利用鋆之余情，暗中撩弄尚家上下，又揭发近身丫环秋菊(杨思琦)原是铿与有夫之妇留下的孽种，连串打击令一代豪门声名狼藉，万劫不复......

programme.title: 香港爱情故事
programme.desc: 暖男设计师陈子朗(罗天宇饰)与理想主义女友邱凯琪(龚嘉欣饰)，是香港典型因土地问题而被迫流离浪荡的情侣。子朗两位妹妹陈子欣(王敏奕饰)和陈子婷(游嘉欣饰)性格极端，摄影师子欣沉沦于艺术家纪家希(谢东闵饰)的失乐园；品学兼优的大学女神子婷，爱之初体验以现实先行，两姐妹各有恋事。子朗、凯琪为觅安乐窝打拼，新婚后居于百多呎的劏房，除了要面对空间不足的生活磨擦外，还要处理双方父母的暮年感情危机！小两口排除万难，置业美梦却一夜变噩梦，为了一层楼竟忘记如何好好恋爱……_x000D_

programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 银楼金粉
programme.desc: 广东佛山第一大银楼『尚银楼』面临生意危机，大老爷尚铿(秦沛)为取得沈家借贷，不惜与正室赛小蝶(薛家燕)施计强逼二少爷尚鋆(伍卫国)与沈家千金沈咏彤(杨婉仪)成亲，令鋆的意中人程秀杏(伍咏薇)一怒之下嫁入尚家做叁姨太。鋆从此与铿反目成仇，远渡重洋，兄弟不相往还。直至老太爷大寿那天，鋆始肯回家，但小儿子突遭绑架，铿不愿交出赎金，令兄弟再起冲突，鋆决意分家。_x000D__x000D_另方面，自鋆回来后，一直被铿冷落的杏面对着二叔深感痛苦，又被诬告害至四姨太霏霏(胡定欣)小产，杏痛定思痛向尚家进行报复，利用鋆之余情，暗中撩弄尚家上下，又揭发近身丫环秋菊(杨思琦)原是铿与有夫之妇留下的孽种，连串打击令一代豪门声名狼藉，万劫不复......

programme.title: 香港爱情故事
programme.desc: 暖男设计师陈子朗(罗天宇饰)与理想主义女友邱凯琪(龚嘉欣饰)，是香港典型因土地问题而被迫流离浪荡的情侣。子朗两位妹妹陈子欣(王敏奕饰)和陈子婷(游嘉欣饰)性格极端，摄影师子欣沉沦于艺术家纪家希(谢东闵饰)的失乐园；品学兼优的大学女神子婷，爱之初体验以现实先行，两姐妹各有恋事。子朗、凯琪为觅安乐窝打拼，新婚后居于百多呎的劏房，除了要面对空间不足的生活磨擦外，还要处理双方父母的暮年感情危机！小两口排除万难，置业美梦却一夜变噩梦，为了一层楼竟忘记如何好好恋爱……_x000D_

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: The Sweet Spot / A Tale of Two Tables
programme.desc: Lincoln devises a plan to get the best seat in the car for a long, family, road trip. // Lincoln tries to prove he's mature enough to have dinner at the adult table, leaving the kiddie table behind him.

programme.title: Project Loud House / In Tents Debate
programme.desc: Lincoln has to get to school on time but getting his sisters out the door proves to be the biggest obstacle of all. // Lincoln is the deciding vote on going to the beach or the amusement park for their family vacation.

programme.desc: After seeing a scary movie (that his parents told him not to), Lincoln can't go to sleep and pulls an all-nighter. // When a common cold ravages through the loud house, Lincoln believes his sisters have turned into Zombies!

programme.title: Neeya Naana
programme.desc: A talk show with a difference - every week a topic is chosen and two groups of people representing extreme ends talk about their views.

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 子俊救人质周雄落海 技术人员传来消息，禁不住诱惑的陈勇果然再次登录网站下注，警方反复观看视讯录像，最终从多个细微的线索中锁定人质所在地点。送赎金与解救剩余人质同时进行，邵子俊出发，大家都很担心，邵子俊按照周雄指示来到一个码头，此时警方已到达周雄据点救下了所有人质。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 枪杀案频发幕后有手 秦老师希望何浩辉能够以警察的角度给同学们讲讲，香港是一个包容的社会，无论什么族裔在香港生活，都应该受到平等的待遇。何浩辉告诉秦老师，有个关于这个主题讲座的最佳人选。谢庭威在何浩辉的推荐下，与孩子们分享自己的亲身经历，演讲受到了师生们的一致好评，谢庭威也与秦老师一见钟情。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 谢庭威卧底兰崖军团 三号车出警，锁匠拉杰正在和人吵架，对方被他推倒晕厥，拉杰被带回警署协助调查。上车前，拉杰告诉谢庭威，自己的父亲住院，急待汇钱救命，恳求谢庭威先放了自己，被庭威拒绝。晚上，谢庭威在自家餐厅看到新闻中提及，最近南亚裔给香港治安带来很大隐患，呼吁政府采取强硬措施。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十四集 三十三岁的生日惊喜 罗曼陈凯西生日将近，今年都是33。这个生日，男人怎么表示，标志着现阶段她们的位置。这时罗爸打来电话，打算给罗曼买房付首付，做生日礼物。但看得上的买不起，买得起的看不上，罗曼问周慕孙意见，周慕孙不掺和，只说选你第一眼就喜欢的，没有和俩人未来相关的意思。罗曼失望。陈凯西和陈勉也不清净。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十五集 最狠的话是最亲的人说的 罗曼和周慕孙算是完了，陈凯西和陈勉也降到冰点，但俩闺蜜都没有告诉对方，继续粉饰太平。陈凯西的视频火了被邀请上节目，让罗曼当军师，其间接到李薇安电话，罗曼对于李薇安的遭遇不是不同情，但也觉得她当初选了靠男人，就要承担男人靠不住的风险，言语之间，陈凯西被激怒，揭穿罗曼这位 “独立女性”不也想靠男人吗？俩人话越来越狠，都照着对方心窝子戳，彻底撕破脸。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十六集 人是在一瞬间长大的 罗曼瞬间长大。想起陈勉的医生表弟方驰，顾不得和陈凯西还在冷战，一个电话打过去，陈凯西让她立刻带上病历和检查报告来医院。医院大厅，罗曼见陈凯西如见亲人，方驰细致周到提醒罗曼注意事项，忙完后罗曼定下神才想起问陈凯西，你来医院干什么？陈凯西说，我怀孕了。罗曼大喜。陈勉得知陈凯西怀孕也十分开心，但约好陪陈凯西产检，他还是缺席了。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十七集 今年的冬天格外冷 罗曼忍不住打给陈凯西，深夜的医院门口小旅馆，陈凯西带着大包小包来了，一通张罗，小房间顿时温馨。俩人仿佛回到了少女时代，点了外卖吃吃喝喝，久违地聊了知心话，再无芥蒂。第二天，陈凯西陪着罗曼罗妈等在手术室门口，谢天谢地，结果是良性的。罗曼一直以来憋着的眼泪终于爆发。方驰攥在手里一张纸巾，没有递出去。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十六集 人是在一瞬间长大的 罗曼瞬间长大。想起陈勉的医生表弟方驰，顾不得和陈凯西还在冷战，一个电话打过去，陈凯西让她立刻带上病历和检查报告来医院。医院大厅，罗曼见陈凯西如见亲人，方驰细致周到提醒罗曼注意事项，忙完后罗曼定下神才想起问陈凯西，你来医院干什么？陈凯西说，我怀孕了。罗曼大喜。陈勉得知陈凯西怀孕也十分开心，但约好陪陈凯西产检，他还是缺席了。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十七集 今年的冬天格外冷 罗曼忍不住打给陈凯西，深夜的医院门口小旅馆，陈凯西带着大包小包来了，一通张罗，小房间顿时温馨。俩人仿佛回到了少女时代，点了外卖吃吃喝喝，久违地聊了知心话，再无芥蒂。第二天，陈凯西陪着罗曼罗妈等在手术室门口，谢天谢地，结果是良性的。罗曼一直以来憋着的眼泪终于爆发。方驰攥在手里一张纸巾，没有递出去。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十八集 这不是心动吧 “美少女壮士“群里资讯不断，见不了面，大家经常开视频聊天：陈氏夫妇感情回温，就是陈勉天天想吃包子，陈凯西做得快吐了；钟倾城跑步看片，积极充电；罗曼忙着转发求助和辟谣，团购物资支援各地，只有偶尔和方驰的聊天，会让她跳出焦虑。局势稳定父母回家，临行前打听方驰情况，罗曼大惊：丧心病狂了吧！方驰才多大！不想父母是打算介绍给她表妹。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十九集 斯人如彩虹 罗曼要搞定的帅哥医生就是方驰。没想到方驰以专心学习拒绝。方驰去露营，罗曼制造偶遇。方驰当做是约会，搭帐篷、生火做饭，上手就是三串一饼，罗曼将话题转到人生目标，试图用参加节目能提高自己的竞争力，与同门刘怡然竞争唯一留院名额，方驰反问她，妳的人生只有第一这个选项？罗曼从小被培养成夺冠赛犬，所有人只看她飞得多高，第一个关心她飞得累不累的，竟然是她以为的小孩，方驰。

programme.title: Mr. X
programme.desc: After gaining the power of invisibility; a man becomes a vigilante, in order to take revenge on those who have wronged him. Release Year: 2015 Director: Vikram Bhatt

programme.desc: A look at India's second confidential nuclear test series at Pokhran led by Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam, during the time of PM Atal Bihari Vajpayee's tenure.

programme.title: Race
programme.desc: A tale of greed, betrayal and revenge as two brothers are pitted against each other! High stakes! Perfect murder! Release Year: 2008 Director: Abbas Burmawalla,Mustan Burmawalla

programme.title: Mission Majnu
programme.desc: Amid the Indo-Pakistani War of 1971, a RAW agent enters Pakistan to prove the country's complicity in nuclear weapons. To succeed, he must alert his nation and avoid an attack on the wrong location. Release Year: 2023 Director: Shantanu Bagchi Awards: 2023 Winner Technical Award Web- Best Screenplay - OTT- Aseem ArroraParveez SheikhSumit - Batheja,2023 Nominee Popular Award- Most Popular Actor in a Digital Film- Sidharth Malhotra

programme.title: Don Aur Doctor
programme.desc: An honest doctor, Das, befriends Deva, a feared gangster. But when duty clashes with loyalty, their strong friendship faces a heartbreaking test.

programme.title: Paltan
programme.desc: Lieutenant Colonel Raj Singh Yadav and his soldiers protect the Nathu La Pass from the Chinese while coping with the pain of being separated from their loved ones. Release Year: 2018 Director: J.P. Dutta Awards: 2019 Nominee Jury's Choice Award- Best Lyricist- Javed Akhtar

programme.title: Parmanu - The Story Of Pokhran
programme.desc: A look at India's second confidential nuclear test series at Pokhran led by Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam, during the time of PM Atal Bihari Vajpayee's tenure.

programme.title: Race
programme.desc: A tale of greed, betrayal and revenge as two brothers are pitted against each other! High stakes! Perfect murder! Release Year: 2008 Director: Abbas Burmawalla,Mustan Burmawalla

programme.title: Sirf Tum
programme.desc: Deepak and Aarti's love blossoms through heartfelt letters. But will they finally meet in bustling Delhi, or will their romance remain a beautiful mystery? Release Year: 1999 Director: Agathiyan Awards: 1999 Winner People's Choice Award- Best Supporting ActreSS- Sushmita Sen

programme.title: Saand Ki Aankh
programme.desc: Chandro and Prakashi, both past sixty, defy age limits as they master shooting, inspiring women across the nation to chase dreams and break social barriers. Release Year: 2019 Director: Tushar Hiranandani Awards: 2020 WinnerCritics' Awards- Best ActreSS- Bhumi Pednekar- Tied withTaapsee Pannu, 2020 WinnerCritics' Awards- Best ActreSS- Taapsee Pannu

programme.title: Coolie (1983)
programme.desc: An honest worker rises against injustice when powerful enemies exploit the poor. With courage and determination, he leads a fiery fight for dignity, justice and survival. Release Year: 1983 Director: Manmohan Desai, Prayag Raj

programme.title: Simmba
programme.desc: A corrupt police officer, works for Durva, an influential smuggler. However, his life takes an unusual turn when he decides to avenge a woman who was assaulted by Durva's brothers. Release Year: 2018 Director: Rohit Shetty Awards: 2019 Winner Bollywood BusineSS Award- Highest-GroSSing Actor- Ranveer Singh

programme.title: Good Boy Bad Boy
programme.desc: Rajan, a bookworm has a somber nature. While Raju is a prankster and has no time for studies. Release Year: 2007 Director: Ashwini Chaudhary

programme.title: GASPOL
programme.desc: Gaspol, an SCTV game show hosted by Raffi Ahmad, is filled with prizes and tens of millions of rupiah in cash.

programme.title: Bang Angkot Please Do Your Magic
programme.desc: Yuli is a beautiful female porter who refuses to be seen as weak or fragile. She takes pride in her physical strength and independence. However, Nazar keeps getting in her way, intentionally offering his help at every turn. Is he truly being kind, or is he just looking for a way to win the heart of the toughest girl at the market?

programme.title: Cinta Suci Gadis Keong Mas
programme.desc: A celebration turns into a nightmare. On her 21st birthday, Livi decides it’s time to settle the score with her stepsister, Hana. Behind the glamour of the party, a cruel scheme is brewing: Livi and Marina are determined to reclaim the house and exile Hana. Will Hana survive the betrayal of the only family she has left?

This season features a refreshed lineup of hosts, bringing together the dynamic chemistry of Ayu Dewi, Gilang Dirga, Arie Kriting, Andhika Pratama, and Uus to lead the hunt for Indonesia’s next comedy star.

programme.title: Abang Layang Layang Gamonin Ayang
programme.desc: The endless bickering between Hardi Fadhillah and Josephine Firmstone shows no sign of stopping. Hardi is obsessed with chasing fallen kites, but he constantly runs into Josephine, a kite vendor who sees his hobby as a threat to her business. It’s a hilarious tug-of-war between a man chasing his passion and a woman protecting her livelihood.

programme.title: Katanya Kamu Suka Modus, Affah Iya?
programme.desc: Farel's car was confiscated and made Farel have to go everywhere by motorcycle. On the road, Farel meets Alin who is in a hurry and suddenly gets on his motorcycle but Farel's motorcycle breaks down. Alin and Farel meet again on campus because Farel is accused of peeping in the women's restroom.

programme.title: Pretty Cheaters, Deadly Lies
programme.desc: After being tricked into a compromising situation, high school senior Hannah Fletcher thinks she can stop her cousin Madison’s blackmail by taking her college entrance exam for her. But nothing is enough for Madison, and her plans soon become deadly…

programme.title: Bad Influence
programme.desc: A single mom is overjoyed when her daughter finally makes friends at her new high school. Soon, however, it becomes clear that this group of students follows their own moral code that’s strange, self-centered, and possibly dangerous.

programme.title: Pretty Cheaters, Deadly Lies
programme.desc: After being tricked into a compromising situation, high school senior Hannah Fletcher thinks she can stop her cousin Madison’s blackmail by taking her college entrance exam for her. But nothing is enough for Madison, and her plans soon become deadly…

programme.title: Framed By My Sister
programme.desc: The families of twin sisters are "infiltrated" by a mysterious triplet, who was separated from them at birth by their adopted mother. She frames one of the twins for murdering the other's husband and then assumes the identity of the widow. Can she succeed?

programme.title: Secrets Of A Gold Digger Killer
programme.desc: When Celeste Beard’s multimillionaire husband was killed by her delusional and disturbed friend Tracey, Celeste was certain she would never be blamed. But Celeste’s twin daughters discovered the truth and works to bring her to justice.

programme.title: Spy Kids: All The Time In The World
programme.desc: The action packed franchise is back…with the next generation of Spy Kids!

programme.title: The Wrong Daughter
programme.desc: Kate and Joe are considering in-vitro options when a child Kate gave up 17 years ago resurfaces. Danica moves in with Kate and as time passes, cracks begin to appear, is she really Kate's daughter?

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 子俊救人质周雄落海 技术人员传来消息，禁不住诱惑的陈勇果然再次登录网站下注，警方反复观看视讯录像，最终从多个细微的线索中锁定人质所在地点。送赎金与解救剩余人质同时进行，邵子俊出发，大家都很担心，邵子俊按照周雄指示来到一个码头，此时警方已到达周雄据点救下了所有人质。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 枪杀案频发幕后有手 秦老师希望何浩辉能够以警察的角度给同学们讲讲，香港是一个包容的社会，无论什么族裔在香港生活，都应该受到平等的待遇。何浩辉告诉秦老师，有个关于这个主题讲座的最佳人选。谢庭威在何浩辉的推荐下，与孩子们分享自己的亲身经历，演讲受到了师生们的一致好评，谢庭威也与秦老师一见钟情。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 谢庭威卧底兰崖军团 三号车出警，锁匠拉杰正在和人吵架，对方被他推倒晕厥，拉杰被带回警署协助调查。上车前，拉杰告诉谢庭威，自己的父亲住院，急待汇钱救命，恳求谢庭威先放了自己，被庭威拒绝。晚上，谢庭威在自家餐厅看到新闻中提及，最近南亚裔给香港治安带来很大隐患，呼吁政府采取强硬措施。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十四集 三十三岁的生日惊喜 罗曼陈凯西生日将近，今年都是33。这个生日，男人怎么表示，标志着现阶段她们的位置。这时罗爸打来电话，打算给罗曼买房付首付，做生日礼物。但看得上的买不起，买得起的看不上，罗曼问周慕孙意见，周慕孙不掺和，只说选你第一眼就喜欢的，没有和俩人未来相关的意思。罗曼失望。陈凯西和陈勉也不清净。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十五集 最狠的话是最亲的人说的 罗曼和周慕孙算是完了，陈凯西和陈勉也降到冰点，但俩闺蜜都没有告诉对方，继续粉饰太平。陈凯西的视频火了被邀请上节目，让罗曼当军师，其间接到李薇安电话，罗曼对于李薇安的遭遇不是不同情，但也觉得她当初选了靠男人，就要承担男人靠不住的风险，言语之间，陈凯西被激怒，揭穿罗曼这位 “独立女性”不也想靠男人吗？俩人话越来越狠，都照着对方心窝子戳，彻底撕破脸。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十六集 人是在一瞬间长大的 罗曼瞬间长大。想起陈勉的医生表弟方驰，顾不得和陈凯西还在冷战，一个电话打过去，陈凯西让她立刻带上病历和检查报告来医院。医院大厅，罗曼见陈凯西如见亲人，方驰细致周到提醒罗曼注意事项，忙完后罗曼定下神才想起问陈凯西，你来医院干什么？陈凯西说，我怀孕了。罗曼大喜。陈勉得知陈凯西怀孕也十分开心，但约好陪陈凯西产检，他还是缺席了。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十七集 今年的冬天格外冷 罗曼忍不住打给陈凯西，深夜的医院门口小旅馆，陈凯西带着大包小包来了，一通张罗，小房间顿时温馨。俩人仿佛回到了少女时代，点了外卖吃吃喝喝，久违地聊了知心话，再无芥蒂。第二天，陈凯西陪着罗曼罗妈等在手术室门口，谢天谢地，结果是良性的。罗曼一直以来憋着的眼泪终于爆发。方驰攥在手里一张纸巾，没有递出去。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十六集 人是在一瞬间长大的 罗曼瞬间长大。想起陈勉的医生表弟方驰，顾不得和陈凯西还在冷战，一个电话打过去，陈凯西让她立刻带上病历和检查报告来医院。医院大厅，罗曼见陈凯西如见亲人，方驰细致周到提醒罗曼注意事项，忙完后罗曼定下神才想起问陈凯西，你来医院干什么？陈凯西说，我怀孕了。罗曼大喜。陈勉得知陈凯西怀孕也十分开心，但约好陪陈凯西产检，他还是缺席了。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十七集 今年的冬天格外冷 罗曼忍不住打给陈凯西，深夜的医院门口小旅馆，陈凯西带着大包小包来了，一通张罗，小房间顿时温馨。俩人仿佛回到了少女时代，点了外卖吃吃喝喝，久违地聊了知心话，再无芥蒂。第二天，陈凯西陪着罗曼罗妈等在手术室门口，谢天谢地，结果是良性的。罗曼一直以来憋着的眼泪终于爆发。方驰攥在手里一张纸巾，没有递出去。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十八集 这不是心动吧 “美少女壮士“群里资讯不断，见不了面，大家经常开视频聊天：陈氏夫妇感情回温，就是陈勉天天想吃包子，陈凯西做得快吐了；钟倾城跑步看片，积极充电；罗曼忙着转发求助和辟谣，团购物资支援各地，只有偶尔和方驰的聊天，会让她跳出焦虑。局势稳定父母回家，临行前打听方驰情况，罗曼大惊：丧心病狂了吧！方驰才多大！不想父母是打算介绍给她表妹。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十九集 斯人如彩虹 罗曼要搞定的帅哥医生就是方驰。没想到方驰以专心学习拒绝。方驰去露营，罗曼制造偶遇。方驰当做是约会，搭帐篷、生火做饭，上手就是三串一饼，罗曼将话题转到人生目标，试图用参加节目能提高自己的竞争力，与同门刘怡然竞争唯一留院名额，方驰反问她，妳的人生只有第一这个选项？罗曼从小被培养成夺冠赛犬，所有人只看她飞得多高，第一个关心她飞得累不累的，竟然是她以为的小孩，方驰。

programme.desc: Winter is drawing to an end. Next year, if sufficient there are sufficient funds, renovation work is planned for the Coaz. Ursula Schranz allows herself a final trip up the Chaputschin. Irene Cotting closes down the Brunni. At the Windegg, the Naues head for the valley to wait for summer.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Clementine de Chabaneix / Nathalie and Christophe Legrand
programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. Willy Chavarria, American-Mexican designer and activist, shows at the American Cathedral in Paris. Bookbinders and gilders, Nathalie and Christophe Legrand restore books which they cover in light.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Crazy for tofu!
programme.desc: On the menu: Greek salad, orange tofu, tofu parmigiana submarine sandwich, oven-baked veggie tacos.

programme.title: Parlons Eco
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Solide
programme.desc: A frank, cynical and sometimes provocative humour. A satirical and militant tone. A knack for phrasing that hits the nail on the head. With ''Solide'', Franco-Beninese comedian Edgar-Yves shares his vision of the world and some personal and professional experiences. His philosophy: do what you want, but stay true to yourself.

programme.title: Edgar-Yves Jr. - Le Prix De La Liberte
programme.desc: Edgar-Yves Junior grew up between Benin and France. His father, a former Beninese ambassador and minister, envisioned him as a lawyer. Yet he chose to become a comedian and advocates for intelligent and responsible freedom of expression. His sharp humor combines self-mockery, controlled provocation, and social reflection.

programme.title: Meurtres A Mont-De-Marsan
programme.desc: The body of a man is found submerged in a spring reputed to be miraculous. Everything suggests an esoteric ritual. Soline Plassin, a gendarmerie commander, teams up with a new deputy, Adam Tudoret. The investigators quickly come to suspect Aurore, Soline's sister, recently released from prison.

programme.title: Petites
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Camille is pregnant. A youth court judge removes her from her toxic family and places her in a youth centre. She finds herself under the authority of Nadine and meets Alison, another resident. In this healthier environment, she is able to think about the future of her pregnancy.

programme.title: 2 Ou 3 Choses Que Je Ne Sais Pas D'elle
programme.desc: At 18, Lila has decided to wear the Muslim headscarf, much to the dismay of her family who have gathered to celebrate Eid. But, after an argument with her boyfriend she is in a resolutely bad mood and decides to slip away.

programme.title: Rennes/Angers
programme.desc: French football championship. Roazhon Park (Rennes). 1st half-time.

programme.title: Rennes/Angers
programme.desc: French football championship. Roazhon Park (Rennes). 2nd half-time.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Forests: the new green gold of Occitanie
programme.desc: The timber industry is a fast-growing sector; the forest is a natural resource that attracts investors. But by seeking to make it profitable, do we risk altering it? How can we turn it into wealth without sacrificing it?

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: Clementine de Chabaneix / Nathalie and Christophe Legrand
programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Terriennes
programme.desc: The ''Terriennes'' portal: a site in French on the status of women around the world.

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: The little log
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Seraphine's birthday
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Snowmelt
programme.desc: Dounia and her grandparents are gradually getting to know Canada, their new country. But for little Dounia, it isn't easy to get used to its seasons, food and language. She misses her father terribly. Fortunately her new friends rally round to help her make progress.

programme.title: Market gardener
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Glasses
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Deconstructed story
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: Manon and the pot of pals
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Bad Lina
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: The competitor
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: Giant octopus
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: The origins of evil
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Rennes/Angers
programme.desc: French football championship. Roazhon Park (Rennes). 1st half-time.

programme.title: Rennes/Angers
programme.desc: French football championship. Roazhon Park (Rennes). 2nd half-time.

programme.title: Territoires De France
programme.desc: Discovering the treasures of the French regions, the initiatives and people who bring them to life.

programme.title: Basik
programme.desc: The programme which explores and explains the economy, examines our relationship to money and analyses our purchasing power. The economic, social and environmental challenges of tomorrow are covered in a direct, down-to-earth and occasionally mischievous manner!

programme.title: A Bon Entendeur
programme.desc: ''ABE'' examines a wide range of topics affecting everyday life in everyday homes: it tests products, compares prices, highlights fraudulent practices, raises consumer awareness and questions manufacturers. The programme addresses economic, social, environmental and health issues and talks about leisure activities, technology...

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Vivement Dimanche
programme.desc: On his iconic red sofa, Michel Drucker welcomes and shines the spotlight on the talent of yesterday, today and tomorrow. A main guest talks about their career, their projects and their origins...

programme.title: Echappees Belles
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: Rohulla Hossiny (Afghanistan)
programme.desc: At 17, fleeing the Taliban, Rohullah Hossiny travels through Iran, Turkey, and Greece before arriving in Belgium. In Brussels, thanks to the Duo for a job association, he finds a mentor and joins Corica, where he becomes a master roaster. In turn, he trains other exiles.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: La Grande Galerie Francophone
programme.desc: Every week and in public, Ali Baddou and his group of columnists receive French-speaking artists who are at the heart of current events and move the lines. Space for exchanges, creations and surprises, ''La Grande Galerie Francophone'' celebrates art in all its diversity and shares it with everyone.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Un Dimanche A La Campagne
programme.desc: A weekend together, far from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. A moment out of time to get to know one another, talk of love, friendship, life. In a house open to surprises and the unexpected, between emotion and laughter, each reveals the invisible thread of their personal story...

programme.title: Top 14 Rugby Le Mag
programme.desc: Presenting the day's action in the Top 14, the French rugby championship, with summaries and highlights from the matches, players interviews and comments.

programme.title: #Investigation
programme.desc: Your rendezvous for current affairs and investigative journalism from the RTBF teams. Research, evidence, personal stories and confrontations are at the heart of the film reports about a range of subjects mainly relating to Belgian society. The key words? Independence and transparency!

programme.desc: The top three geisha idol celebrities in Edo are Tomimoto Toyohina, Takashima Ohisa, and Naniwaya Kita; see how Kitagawa Utamaro, the master of female beauty, has illustrated them so differently.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: Phase Free is a disaster preparedness concept that does not distinguish between everyday life and emergency situations - we see how everyday items can be used in times of disaster as well.

programme.title: Kabuki Kool
programme.desc: Explore the fascinating conventions and traditions of kabuki. Actor Kataoka Ainosuke explains the origins and meanings of kabuki's unique make-up, its onnagata techniques, and stage machinery.

programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Navigating Disasters
programme.desc: Major earthquakes frequently cause unexpected damage over wide and distant areas - we share our experiences and disaster prevention knowledge in Asia and around the world.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Biz Stream
programme.desc: Freight Expectations: This episode examines how agile logistics players are tackling the industry's toughest hurdles by breaking traditional norms and finding efficiency in unexpected places.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan
programme.desc: We see the old ways of living in northern Niigata as we try spicy daikon radish rolls and fluffy manju buns, go gill fishing, and see cat houses made from rice straw and a lovely old lacquer craft.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Kimono Truth
programme.desc: The kimono is admired worldwide yet remains a mystery to many - we unravel truths about the traditional garment and its styles.

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Great Japanese music this week: NOA, an up-and-coming singer, dancer, and actor who trained in South Korea before debuting in Japan; and DEZOLVE, a young fusion band with dazzling virtuoso chops.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: An animated series about a Japanese dog who gets lost in New York City. Charo says 'I want to see my owner again!', and so he starts his adventure to find his way back home.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: The waxing and waning moon has been loved, cherished, and given many special names throughout Japan's history - we explore the moon's continuing significance in agriculture, fishing, and daily life.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: We take in Mount Fuji, Japan's tallest mountain, and meet some cats on the way - one called Bond carries out top-secret missions at a peach orchard as another patrols its 100-year-old winery home.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan Highlights
programme.desc: Yamagata is famous for its food, some of which is unique to late autumn and certain localities - our gourmet cyclist explores the regional cuisine from edible chrysanthemums to turnips and salmon.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Somewhere Street
programme.desc: Charleston, a historic East Coast port city founded in 1670, charms visitors with cobblestone streets, horse-drawn carriages, and rich history - it's loved by both international and US travellers.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: Nishijin-ori - beauty synthesised in a Kyoto brocade. Dive deep into the beauty of the ancient capital which is still innovative 1,200 years after its foundation.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Accelerate your Japanese language skills! Learn practical and effective workplace expressions, understand business culture, and improve your kanji!

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Wedding dresses with even slight damage often have to be discarded - Nogami Yuko uses these for upcycling and brings happiness from one bride to another with remakes that are better than new.
