programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Great Japanese music this week: NOA, an up-and-coming singer, dancer, and actor who trained in South Korea before debuting in Japan; and DEZOLVE, a young fusion band with dazzling virtuoso chops.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: An animated series about a Japanese dog who gets lost in New York City. Charo says 'I want to see my owner again!', and so he starts his adventure to find his way back home.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: The waxing and waning moon has been loved, cherished, and given many special names throughout Japan's history - we explore the moon's continuing significance in agriculture, fishing, and daily life.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: We take in Mount Fuji, Japan's tallest mountain, and meet some cats on the way - one called Bond carries out top-secret missions at a peach orchard as another patrols its 100-year-old winery home.

programme.title: 少林子弟
programme.desc: 明末明将吴三桂卖国降清引狼入室，大明江山亦为满清所并，举国有气节之士无不感悲愤。少林子弟纷纷下山，串联各地好汉抗清复明；清官招降纳叛，广收武当、峨嵋派的江湖败类，勾结地方恶霸，向少林子弟赶尽杀绝，洪、方、胡等处在重重危机险恶之中...

programme.title: 香港73
programme.desc: 1973年，香港股市暴涨人人热衷炒卖股票，小市民因急于入住廉租屋而被不法之徒骗取金钱，及教育制度不健全引起民怨等均被改编成电影中的情节。故事讽刺写实，反映了香港当时的真实面貌！

programme.title: 血洒天牢
programme.desc: 宋末，大元初把天下统一，元帅将宋丞相文天祥打入天牢，意图说服其归元，亦希望借机将往救文之抗元义士一网打尽。义士之一白鸭儿在拯救途上，遇着「金掌」乐何如，忙邀共同救国，但乐自认跟踪白为贪图美色，救国非少数人所能为，拒绝后旋即逸去。及后，一众义士为救文，纷纷藉故犯法，先后成功被关入天牢，白竟在天牢再遇乐...

programme.title: 后门
programme.desc: 本片由著名文学家徐吁的小说《后门》改编，故事讲述徐天鹤与太太结婚多年，膝下犹虚，对隔壁小女孩阿琳甚有好感。阿琳父母离婚，孤苦伶仃，徐太太提议收阿琳为继女，琳父母喜不自胜。后来阿琳亲母史小姐出现，要接回阿琳；徐太太不忍拆散母女骨肉，毅然将阿琳交回亲母。

programme.title: 黑鹰
programme.desc: 新加坡的黑鹰组织专与香港保险业作对。私家侦探张世杰从黑鹰领袖陈祖培女儿丽思入手。他俩认识后，不断受到狙击追杀，原来陈祖培于一年前已遭人杀害，胡媚用陈名义发号施令，为非作歹。张世杰与黑鹰集团展开连场激战！

programme.title: 夕阳恋人
programme.desc: 这是日本导演上梅次文艺片的经典。故事描述井莉饰的车衣女工与秦沛饰的修车工，在夕阳萌生感情，后女因识破男的太子爷身份，深感受骗...

programme.title: 绝代双骄
programme.desc: 江小鱼在父母被杀后，与孪生兄弟花无缺失散。自小被带往恶人谷，并由一班恶人谷谷主共同抚养成人的江小鱼，长大后决定离开恶人谷，出外闯蘯江湖。他最后可否成功为父母报仇，又能否再遇孪生兄弟花无缺？

programme.title: 青春恋
programme.desc: 酷爱音乐的留学生李英伟临危受命替老父接管公司，其嬉皮士形像为祖母不屑。李的公司职员林仲鹏乘机制造事端，图谋夺取其总经理之职位。李之青梅竹马朋友王凤不忍见李受屈，化身金发美人巧施妙计助他解困，自此李对此神秘女郎一见钟情 。

programme.title: 方世玉与洪熙官
programme.desc: 清兵火烧少林寺，少林弟子洪熙官身受重伤，负伤潜逃。刚巧方世玉经过，误认洪熙官为无恶不作之徒，并将其交付清兵。当方世玉知道自己误捉洪熙官时，千方百计要救出他，好让二人可合力将清兵击退。

programme.title: 风花雪月
programme.desc: 本片由两个单元故事组成。首个故事讲述柳宣教策划了一个破玉通禅师「色戒」之奇计，着美艳妓女红莲向玉通大施色诱攻势。第二个故事讲述少女冯玉华之母冯孙氏欠下九尾狐一笔钱无法偿还，被逼做妓女还债。后冯孙氏因性病死去，遗下一笔债务以及殓葬费须玉华偿还；玉华无奈，只好踏上母亲所走过之路...

programme.title: 魔界
programme.desc: 故事讲述，警局侦缉部情侣探员郑忠与王丽芬同往离岛露营，半夜丽芬忽闻异声，离营探看，突见绿光一闪，随即着魔。翌日，王警官率众处理一宗挟持人质案件，期间丽芬径自开枪射杀劫匪，过程被杂志记者阿古摄得，发现子弹竟能转向杀人...

programme.title: 陆小凤传奇之绣花大盗
programme.desc: 一辆镖车在押送途中遭一身穿红棉袄、脚穿红绣花鞋的绣花大盗劫走。戒备森严的平南王府宝库也遭窃，王府总管的双眼更被劫匪刺瞎。束手无策的总捕头金九龄请陆小凤出马调查此案。陆小凤可否凭绣花大盗在案发现场所留下之刺绣查明他真正身分？

programme.title: 三闯少林
programme.desc: 四大家族之一的金虎堡堡主在一次押镖途中，被四名蒙面和尚劫杀。叶青花被怀疑与案有关，游侠雷迅助友洗脱嫌疑，竟卷入奇案，三闯少林。雷迅找出四名和尚，当众伏法，以为真相大白；岂料，不久武林又传出四名和尚到处行凶，雷迅才知道被人利用，引发连场打斗。

programme.title: 喷火美人鱼
programme.desc: 三对年青男女出海渡假，忽然听到新闻报导：一个穿红色比坚尼泳衣的女郎一连杀了十三人，并正驾驶着快艇逃亡。正在此时，一个美的女郎破浪而来，身穿红色比坚尼。女郎要求跟他们同上岛避风。当晚，女郎的挑逗令众男女之间产生前所未有的冲突... 电影未到最后一分钟，不知结局。

programme.title: 四骑士
programme.desc: 韩战结束之后的汉城，出现了近代四骑士。他们包括拳术教官金义、搏击教练冯侠、爆破专家高英寒及枪械专家李维诗。四人于兵燹之中幸存，不约而同以寻欢作乐作为生活方式。以霍克、雷泰、银花为首的贩毒组织，欲收买退役美国军曹偷运毒品回国，军曹最后不欲冒险，被霍克手下爪牙杀死。冯侠被嫁祸成杀人嫌疑犯，金义、高英寒、李维诗为救朋友，同心协力与罪恶组织展开多场生死搏斗...

programme.title: 蓝与黑续集
programme.desc: 剧情承接上集，唐琪结束夜总会歌女生涯，在战乱中跑遍中国寻找爱人张醒亚，但醒亚却纠缠于日军，叛乱分子及将军的美丽女儿当中。

programme.title: 多情剑客无情剑
programme.desc: 李寻欢是一个风流多情的剑客，却已退出江湖，十年来过着平淡的生活。因梅花盗重现江湖，他重回阔别十年之故园兴云庄。然而，当李寻欢回到兴云庄后，却发现早已物是人非。

programme.title: 鱼美人
programme.desc: 张珍与金宠之女牡丹早有婚约，金宠却欲退婚。张珍偶遇化身金牡丹样子的鲤鱼精，两人渐生情愫。一天，金宠请包公来公断两个真假牡丹，包公为成全二人，推辞此案...

programme.title: 红孩儿
programme.desc: 牛魔王与铁扇公主夫妇为吃唐僧肉，命儿子红孩儿对付孙悟空师徒。红孩儿凭"三昧真火"屡挫悟空，后幸得观音命龙女协助悟空救回唐僧等人，更将红孩儿点化，收其为观音身边的善才童子。此片弘扬回头是岸的大道理，发人深省。

programme.title: 盘丝洞
programme.desc: 本片为邵氏「西游记」系列的第三部作品。唐僧落入了七位蜘蛛精的手中，希望食唐僧肉而得到永生。悟空、八戒和沙僧因此大闹盘丝洞拯救唐僧。

programme.title: 少林英雄榜
programme.desc: 少林寺主持安排至善禅师前往武当道长处，学习独特的功夫技能。在路途中，他遭遇了清兵与明军之间的激烈斗争，同时还需召集少林弟子重建被烧毁的少林寺。

programme.title: 乾隆下江南
programme.desc: 乾隆为体察民情，撇下侍卫假扮商人微服出访江南，期间得知衙门有贪官欺压百姓，导致民不聊生。这时乾隆遇上一名清廉的卖菜青年，二人合力教训贪官一顿。最后，青年更被获封为皇帝的近身侍卫。

programme.title: Grudge Match
programme.desc: Thirty years after their last title fight, two retired boxers and lifelong rivals decide to step into the ring once more to settle an old score.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Three divorced women seek revenge on the husbands who left them for younger women.

programme.title: Piece By Piece
programme.desc: Follow this autobiography where Pharrell Williams shows his imaginative and creative process using Lego, as he constructs Lego models representing his artistic development. Each build reflects a different creative milestone.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: A young man discovers the meaning of true love while battling princes, ghosts and an evil witch in a quest to protect the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: Scooby and the gang face their biggest, most challenging mystery ever, a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: The Lord Of The Rings: The War Of The Rohirrim
programme.desc: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim tells the fate of the House of Helm Hammerhand, the legendary King of Rohan.

programme.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
programme.desc: Plagued by a violent recurring nightmare, a college student heads home to track down the one person who might be able to save her family.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Strange Strife of the Smelly Socktopus
programme.desc: After Erica convinces them that being suspended is a great vacation, George and Harold pull off every prank they can think of in order to get suspended

programme.title: Fluffy Flufferton
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Towaconstrictors
programme.desc: Revvit maps a path to a magical forest where the Dinotrux can explore and have fun, but once they arrive the crew is startled by Towaconstrictors

programme.title: Lucky and the Ghostly Gotcha!
programme.desc: When Snips claims not to be afraid of ghosts, the PALs decide to give him a fun Halloween scare he’ll never forget!

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Frenzied Farts of Flabby Flabulous
programme.desc: George and Harold create a comic book about their gym teacher, but after a freak accident turns fantasy into reality, the best friends must run from his revenge

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Dreadful Debacle of DJ Drowsy Drawers
programme.desc: George and Harold attempt to save the fun at their school dance, but matters are made worse when their music teachers transforms into the dull yet deadly villain DJ Drowsy Drawers

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Horrible Hostilities of the Homework Hydra
programme.desc: When George and Harold go back in time to stop the invention of homework, they realize they also eliminated the most important thing in the world: comic books

programme.title: A Cause for The Paws
programme.desc: Po, at the top of his game but lonely, comes across two weasels stealing an earthquake causing gauntlet and tries to stop them, but inadvertently destroys a town. He loses his title as Dragon Master and teams up with Wandering Blade, a knight on a mission from England, to track down the weasels and get his title back.

programme.title: The Knight’s Code
programme.desc: Po and Blade's personalities clash as they track Klaus and Veruca and fight off some of Po's old foes. Blade gets to see Po's kung fu mastery, but doesn't agree to team up with him until she realizes that he accidentally holds the key to finding Klaus and Veruca: he has a piece of the WuGao Gauntlet. Meanwhile, Klaus and Veruca continue on their path of destruction while looking for the mysterious "Lotus".

programme.title: The Lotus
programme.desc: Po's moral lines are blurred when he and Blade have to break an untrustworthy hedgehog monk (Zhen) out of jail to get more information on what Klaus and Veruca stole from the Lotus. They learn from Zhen that there are in fact three more weapons, and Po recognizes one of them from a comic book.

programme.title: Fluffy Flufferton
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Cakey’s Cupcake Cousins
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby, I Shrunk the Kitties!
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: P.U.
programme.desc: Boss Baby must "de-stink" Simmons after a misfire of Stinkless Serum, and Tim & Danny try to upgrade their small- scale taxi business

programme.title: Hush, Little Baby
programme.desc: When Frederic Estes tries to get babies banned from the local library, the babies fight back in a war for story time

programme.title: Night of the Frodarg
programme.desc: On a dark and stormy night, Tim's fears of a local legend and Boss Baby's fear of a PuppyCo agent force the brothers to unite to stay safe as the house is infiltrated

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Harmful Horrors of the Harrowing Hiveschool
programme.desc: After injecting all the teachers with bee DNA, the Melvins run the new "hivemind" of the school. But Ms. Ribble is accidently injected with too much "Bee- NA" and becomes the queen bee, overpowering the Melvins' control. George, Harold and the recently re-hired Vice Principal Krupp must work with the Melvins and stop her from turning everyone into her Zombees.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Preposterous Pulverizing of the Pestering Poopacabra
programme.desc: In hopes of raising their grades so they can go to Lake Summer Camp, George and Harold must teach Ratrick, their assigned rat, a simple task. But Ratrick runs away into the sewers where he is doused with toxic waste and transformed into Poopacabra! It's now up to the boys and Captain Underpants to stop the beast before it takes over Piqua with its stench, and more importantly, ruins the boys' chances to go to Lake Summer Camp.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Dastardlys Deed of the Devious Diddlysaurus
programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. When Melvin brings in a dinosaur frozen in ice, the boys try to get rid of it. But the ice thaws and they meet Diddlysaurus, a prankster raptor who's huge fans of the boys. He offers to help them with their project if he can pull pranks with them, but when the pranks go too far, the boys and Captain Underpants have to deal with the dino.

programme.title: Tchau, Uggos
programme.desc: Our team battles Rafaela’s mind-controlled crowd. They soon discover that Rafaela’s true plan is to steal the spy plane. Tony deduces that Rafaela isn’t doing all of this for the money - she’s doing it for family.

programme.title: The Giant Haboob
programme.desc: Cleve Kelso breaks Rafaela Moreno and a dangerous, cybernetic prisoner named Matsuo Mori from a high-security ice prison. Back in LA, Tony and the crew experience a major shake-up when Echo gets accepted to Ms. Nowhere’s spy training but Tony is rejected. While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms.

programme.title: The Dead End
programme.desc: The team travels to Nihaya, or "The Dead End," in their pursuit of Nowhere’s mission. Unfortunately they run into some of Layla’s spurned former criminal partner Sandocal, who steals the kids’ cars for revenge on Layla. With Frostee, Cisco, and Echo held captive, Tony and Layla drive for Sandocal in a dune buggy race to win back their crew’s freedom.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Frenzied Farts of Flabby Flabulous
programme.desc: George and Harold create a comic book about their gym teacher, but after a freak accident turns fantasy into reality, the best friends must run from his revenge

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Horrible Hostilities of the Homework Hydra
programme.desc: When George and Harold go back in time to stop the invention of homework, they realize they also eliminated the most important thing in the world: comic books

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Vexing Villainy of the Vile Vimpire
programme.desc: When Erica makes fun of George and Harold’s latest and greatest comic, they make a comic about her becoming a vampire

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Jarring Jerkiness of the Judge J.O.R.T.S
programme.desc: George and Harold transform their new Spanish teacher into a superhero after they feel guilty for pranking him, but their teacher loves it and gets carried away

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Strange Strife of the Smelly Socktopus
programme.desc: After Erica convinces them that being suspended is a great vacation, George and Harold pull off every prank they can think of in order to get suspended

programme.title: Enter the Dragon Master
programme.desc: After absorbing the mystical Hero Chi of the Four Constellations, four panda kids enlist the Dragon Master to teach them Kung Fu

programme.title: Terra Incognita Part One
programme.desc: The evil General Morando launches a coup on the alien planet Akiridion-5. In the ensuing battle, the planet's King and Queen are severely injured, and their surviving son Krel and daughter Aja escape the planet with military commander, Varvatos Vex. They seek refuge on a backwater planet: Earth.

programme.title: Terra Incognita Part Two
programme.desc: Aja, Krel, and Vex explore Earth looking for technology to repair their ship. When the high school Principal demands to meet Aja and Krel's guardians, the Royal teens transform two maintenance robots (Blanks) to pose as their "human" parents.

programme.title: Disco Dancer
programme.desc: Anil's mother is falsely accused of theft and jailed. Anil swears to set this right one day. Years later, he becomes a big star and restores his mother's honour. Now his fame earns him more enemies.

programme.title: Ab Tak Chhappan 2
programme.desc: Sadhu Agashe, a retired encounter specialist, faces a series of challenges after he returns to Mumbai to solve various criminal cases growing in the city.

programme.title: Maaman
programme.desc: The emotional conflict between a maternal uncle and his nephew, delving into their strained relationship and the challenges that test their bond.

programme.title: Kantara
programme.desc: When greed paves the way for betrayal, scheming and murder, a young tribal reluctantly dons the traditions of his ancestors to seek justice.

programme.title: Pk
programme.desc: An innocent alien lands on Earth but loses his communication device. He meets Jaggu, a heartbroken reporter, and tries to find his device. With time, he raises many thought-provoking questions.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: The son of a wealthy, powerful industrialist returns to India and undergoes a remarkable transformation as he becomes consumed by a quest for vengeance against those threatening his father's life.

programme.title: Manjummel Boys
programme.desc: A carefree adventure turns perilous when one friend falls into Guna Caves, triggering a gripping test of unity and survival against impossible odds.

programme.title: Ashwamedham
programme.desc: Dhruva an undercover agent is on a mission to catch the culprits, who intend to loot the National treasure by using professional hackers.

programme.title: Mere Husband Ki Biwi
programme.desc: A divorced man's life turns chaotic when his college crush returns just as his amnesiac ex-wife reappears, sparking a hilarious love triangle full of confusion

programme.title: The Making Of Pk
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Starfish
programme.desc: While working at a dredging company, a diver seeks out the truth behind a tragic loss, but an unexpected romance could help or hinder her search.

programme.title: Namak Haram
programme.desc: Two young men from vastly different worlds, a Delhi slum and a Calcutta mansion, form a bond that is put to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Nazar Andaaz
programme.desc: A carefree blind man living with his loyal caretaker inadvertently launches a chaotic competition for his wealth when he befriends a small-time thief.

programme.title: Bhool Chuk Maaf
programme.desc: Ranjan, a small-town romantic from Banaras, gets a government job to marry Titli, but forgets his vow to Lord Shiva. Trapped by fate, he must fulfil his promise in a funny journey of love.

programme.title: Article 370
programme.desc: A young field agent is picked from the Prime Minister's office for a top-secret mission to crack down on terrorism and corruption.

programme.title: Khel Khel Mein
programme.desc: Friends at a dinner play a game where everyone unlocks their phones and shares their messages and calls. The game starts out as fun but it takes a turn when secrets are revealed.

programme.title: Arjun Patiala
programme.desc: Arjun Patiala is a quirky small-town cop, who is fond of women and even more fond of his drinks. His original and unusual ideas help reduce crime rate in the town.

programme.title: Running Man
programme.desc: The must watch for K-Variety shows! In this "urban action variety", the hosts complete a series of obstacles and aim to eliminate each other to win.

programme.title: Curtain Call
programme.desc: Sang Cheol warns Moon Seong against telling the truth to Geum Soon. Jae Heon stops Se Yeon from talking to a reporter about her marriage with Dong Je.

programme.title: Curtain Call
programme.desc: Geum Soon starts having doubts about Jae Heon's identity after her talk with Moon Seong. Yoon Hee advises Se Yeon to increase the hotel's stock price.

programme.title: Curtain Call
programme.desc: Se Yeon makes a deal with a reporter to post an article on her marriage with Dong Je. Yoon Hee overhears Jae Heon confessing his feelings to Se Yeon.

programme.title: Adventure By Accident 3
programme.desc: From South America to India, Kian84 fulfilled his travel bucket list one by one. For the third season, Kian84 goes on an island trip to Madagascar!

programme.title: The Great Queen Seondeok
programme.desc: Mi Sil warns Cheon Myeong to run away through Deok Man, and Jinpyeong orders to expel the Gaya people from Seorabeol.

programme.title: The Great Queen Seondeok
programme.desc: Deok Man sends a secret report to the king to find her identity, and Cheon Myeong suspects that Deok Man is her twin.

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 子俊救人质周雄落海 技术人员传来消息，禁不住诱惑的陈勇果然再次登录网站下注，警方反复观看视讯录像，最终从多个细微的线索中锁定人质所在地点。送赎金与解救剩余人质同时进行，邵子俊出发，大家都很担心，邵子俊按照周雄指示来到一个码头，此时警方已到达周雄据点救下了所有人质。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 枪杀案频发幕后有手 秦老师希望何浩辉能够以警察的角度给同学们讲讲，香港是一个包容的社会，无论什么族裔在香港生活，都应该受到平等的待遇。何浩辉告诉秦老师，有个关于这个主题讲座的最佳人选。谢庭威在何浩辉的推荐下，与孩子们分享自己的亲身经历，演讲受到了师生们的一致好评，谢庭威也与秦老师一见钟情。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 谢庭威卧底兰崖军团 三号车出警，锁匠拉杰正在和人吵架，对方被他推倒晕厥，拉杰被带回警署协助调查。上车前，拉杰告诉谢庭威，自己的父亲住院，急待汇钱救命，恳求谢庭威先放了自己，被庭威拒绝。晚上，谢庭威在自家餐厅看到新闻中提及，最近南亚裔给香港治安带来很大隐患，呼吁政府采取强硬措施。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十四集 三十三岁的生日惊喜 罗曼陈凯西生日将近，今年都是33。这个生日，男人怎么表示，标志着现阶段她们的位置。这时罗爸打来电话，打算给罗曼买房付首付，做生日礼物。但看得上的买不起，买得起的看不上，罗曼问周慕孙意见，周慕孙不掺和，只说选你第一眼就喜欢的，没有和俩人未来相关的意思。罗曼失望。陈凯西和陈勉也不清净。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十五集 最狠的话是最亲的人说的 罗曼和周慕孙算是完了，陈凯西和陈勉也降到冰点，但俩闺蜜都没有告诉对方，继续粉饰太平。陈凯西的视频火了被邀请上节目，让罗曼当军师，其间接到李薇安电话，罗曼对于李薇安的遭遇不是不同情，但也觉得她当初选了靠男人，就要承担男人靠不住的风险，言语之间，陈凯西被激怒，揭穿罗曼这位 “独立女性”不也想靠男人吗？俩人话越来越狠，都照着对方心窝子戳，彻底撕破脸。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十六集 人是在一瞬间长大的 罗曼瞬间长大。想起陈勉的医生表弟方驰，顾不得和陈凯西还在冷战，一个电话打过去，陈凯西让她立刻带上病历和检查报告来医院。医院大厅，罗曼见陈凯西如见亲人，方驰细致周到提醒罗曼注意事项，忙完后罗曼定下神才想起问陈凯西，你来医院干什么？陈凯西说，我怀孕了。罗曼大喜。陈勉得知陈凯西怀孕也十分开心，但约好陪陈凯西产检，他还是缺席了。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十七集 今年的冬天格外冷 罗曼忍不住打给陈凯西，深夜的医院门口小旅馆，陈凯西带着大包小包来了，一通张罗，小房间顿时温馨。俩人仿佛回到了少女时代，点了外卖吃吃喝喝，久违地聊了知心话，再无芥蒂。第二天，陈凯西陪着罗曼罗妈等在手术室门口，谢天谢地，结果是良性的。罗曼一直以来憋着的眼泪终于爆发。方驰攥在手里一张纸巾，没有递出去。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.desc: 习武多年的梁坤为守护心爱之人本不愿再过问江湖之事，却因此导致心爱之人惨死，梁坤也就此明白江湖的真意。他最终在丐帮长老苏灿的帮助下重返江湖，力战群寇，成功为爱人报仇雪恨。

programme.title: 贼王之王
programme.desc: 两名私家侦探欲藉破一连环大劫案而声名大噪。岂料调查过程中竟一再被贼王使计愚弄，笑话连篇。及后更发现原来所有劫案均与日商宫本有关，到底谁才是真正的贼王之王？

programme.title: 神勇双妹唛
programme.desc: 故事描述一对表姐妹梁山伯与祝英台乃斗气冤家，两女为争夺神秘俊男阿山欢心，却惹来大圈杀手威吓逼害，更陷入一场宝物争夺战。两女身陷险境，惟有摒弃前嫌，联手反抗......

programme.title: 烈探
programme.desc: 警探张荼为救落入人贩之手的儿子，不惜孤身深入敌穴，跨国追击，但却被牵扯进大型儿童拐卖案。在寻找儿子的过程中，他和身份神秘的女子携手捣毁了一个大型国际犯罪集团，上演了一场惊心动魄的绝地生死营救。

programme.title: 撞邪先生
programme.desc: 美容院职员曾小雨机缘巧合之下，认识了富豪之子利志，以为交上好运。岂料利志的父亲是茅山高人，在南洋大败一降头师时，被下咒绝子绝孙，让利志每次恋爱皆遭恶鬼破坏，无疾而终。小雨深爱利志，找大法师沈慈航帮助，授以五色驱邪带，两人顺利结婚。新婚之夜，利志遗失了驱邪彩带，果然恶鬼来犯...

programme.title: 叶问
programme.desc: 咏春大师叶问的功夫在中国各地备受推崇。正值日本侵华，叶问被迫离开家园并要找工作养家糊口。他唯有无奈地以咏春拳教导学生自卫训练，以赚取生活费用。

programme.title: 逃学威龙 2
programme.desc: 周星星遭降职后愤而辞去警职，私自潜入一所国际学校，调查国际恐怖分子的阴谋。期间，他意外发现探员达叔正假扮成教师。两人随即联手，共同对抗全副武装的罪犯，展开一场终极对决。

programme.title: 千王斗千霸
programme.desc: 一位名震千坛的千王之王及其伙伴被政府雇用，以调查一名赌术了得的上海大亨。当局怀疑他藉开赌场掩饰其在上海情报机关的日本千霸身份。

programme.title: 济公
programme.desc: 周星驰饰演天庭中犯下天条的狂妄之神，被派往凡间化身为济公，并立志要感化三个注定沦为「九世乞丐」、「九世妓女」及「九世恶人」之凡人。如济公能于三天内顺利完成此事，他便可重返天庭。

programme.title: 风流冤鬼
programme.desc: 红歌女阿花遭大户陶老爷奸杀，陶宅即常闹鬼，后陶老爷亦神秘死亡。陶之后人陶明嗜赌如命，更因鬼魂作怪而欠下钜款。明妻暗中将陶宅售予杨教授夫妇，即遇上怪事连篇...

programme.title: 叶问 2
programme.desc: 日本侵华后，咏春大师叶问与家人因生活艰难离开佛山，远赴香港开馆收徒，希望可以开展新生活。但事情并未如所想般容易，他欲在香港开武馆，就必须接受各大门派的挑战。一场又一场的功夫较量正式展开！

programme.title: 见怪
programme.desc: 失明的游己任在离岛的工厂工作。一天，因飓风的破坏，工厂与外界隔绝。此时突然有一只怪物来袭，任何看到怪物的人都会化成黑影。因游己任看不见怪物，他能成功协助伙伴安全离开，更奋战反击，誓要杀死怪物！

programme.title: 霍家拳之精武英雄
programme.desc: 陈真在日本流学时，发现多名中国学生失踪，意外揭发黑龙会的阴谋。原来，黑龙会研发新药以增强日本军在战争中的体能，并捉拿中国学生做实验。于是，陈真誓要瓦解黑龙会，并将其实验密室捣毁。

programme.title: 夜守
programme.desc: 在一次车祸后失忆的王人杰找到夜间警卫的工作。午夜，他准时抵达废弃的大厦上班，却发现三只冤魂如约而至，并揭发了一场复仇计画。究竟这是命运的安排还是邪灵的诅咒？

programme.title: 鬼马飞人
programme.desc: 阿B为一名中学的体育教师，其执教之学校篮、足球队成绩甚差，学校下令他务必赢得校际比赛冠军，否则将撤换教练。阿B因头痛，误服同事研制之神药，变成超人，令球队屡次创造奇迹...

programme.title: 裂战
programme.desc: 为了对抗温室效应，女科学家颜欣培育出超级橡胶种子，前往一个荒岛进行种植，希望将那里改变为一片欣欣向荣的新土地。然而，她的前夫决定在这趟危险的旅程中保护她，与她结伴同行。抵达后，他们面临接连不断的冲突，并遇上当地的贩毒组织，一场生死对决随即展开。

programme.title: 少年叶问之危机时刻
programme.desc: 1917年，少年叶问初到香港求学。英文演讲比赛当天，学校发生一宗惊天绑架案，全校同学都被挟持。面对眼前的危机，叶问挺身而出，发现绑匪竟然是自己的师父和好兄弟。少年叶问在危机时刻可否打败绑匪，从而伸张正义？

programme.title: 柠檬可乐
programme.desc: 就读女校高中的婷婷，因排演《罗密欧与茱丽叶》而与邻校男生Jackson戏假情真，爱情就在排练时萌芽。这是婷婷的初恋，但Jaskson却是一个变幻莫测的爱情玩家...

programme.title: 逃学威龙
programme.desc: 飞虎队精英周星星奉命潜入校园，调查一宗警枪失窃案。在拍档达叔的协助下，他不仅成功寻回失枪，更意外揭发一宗大型地下军火交易。走私集团为报复，悍然持械闯入学校，挟持多名学生作为人质。周星星必须不惜一切代价，拯救所有人质。

programme.title: 关云长
programme.desc: 这是一场发生在三国动荡时期的史诗式之旅。曹操试图招揽关羽加入他的阵营，但关羽忠于他的结拜兄弟刘备，也是曹操的敌人。当关羽试图从曹操手上救出刘备的小妾时，迫于无奈要大开杀戒。最后他能否杀出重围？

programme.title: 倾城之恋
programme.desc: 本片由香港导演许鞍华执导，改编自著名小说家张爱玲的同名小说，是一个发生在日军入侵香港期间的爱情故事。一个内向的上海离婚女子和一个愤世嫉俗的马来西亚花花公子互相倾慕。但因时局动荡，两人多次被迫分开，最终能否有情人终成眷属?

programme.title: 中华英雄
programme.desc: 1913年，华英雄惨遭灭门，愤然流亡美国。妻子洁瑜怀孕寻夫，二人异乡重逢。孰料龙凤胎出生当夜，中华楼遭敌纵火，洁瑜惨死、女婴被掳。十六年后，子华剑雄踏上寻父之路，华英雄则于自由女神像顶，与宿敌无敌展开生死决战。

programme.title: 鹿鼎记
programme.desc: 韦小宝被反清复明的"天地会"被派到皇宫当卧底，受命查探四十二章经下落。韦小宝很快成为康熙皇帝的心腹，但他既要执行天地会的任务，最后陷入两难的状态。

programme.title: 蜀山传
programme.desc: 峨眉派弟子玄天宗奉师命下山，联合昆仑派掌门孤月大师及各大门派，对抗企图统治天下的邪恶力量幽泉血魔。随着正邪大战一触即发，玄天宗在守护苍生的同时，也面对昔日情感与信念的考验。在正义与牺牲之间，众人必须放下执念，合力迎战这场决定人间命运的终极之战。

programme.title: 你好，星期六
programme.desc: 节目通过新奇多样的环节设置和兼具知识性、趣味性的创意内容，深度展现明星艺能。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 灼灼风流
programme.desc: 讲述了心存凌云之志、一心考取功名的女官慕灼华（景甜饰）与沙场沐血折戟、誓为同袍雪冤的战神刘衍（冯绍峰饰）彼此救赎、相知相爱，携手守家卫国的故事。

programme.title: 灼灼风流
programme.desc: 讲述了心存凌云之志、一心考取功名的女官慕灼华（景甜饰）与沙场沐血折戟、誓为同袍雪冤的战神刘衍（冯绍峰饰）彼此救赎、相知相爱，携手守家卫国的故事。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 夜限照相馆
programme.desc: 剧情讲述只为逝者存在的鬼客专门照相馆的刻薄摄影师徐奇周（周元饰）和热血的律师韩春（权娜拉饰）与阴森森的夜客们来往于生死之间惊险又奇妙的故事。

programme.title: 夜限照相馆
programme.desc: 剧情讲述只为逝者存在的鬼客专门照相馆的刻薄摄影师徐奇周（周元饰）和热血的律师韩春（权娜拉饰）与阴森森的夜客们来往于生死之间惊险又奇妙的故事。

programme.title: 灼灼风流

programme.title: 灼灼风流
programme.desc: 讲述了心存凌云之志、一心考取功名的女官慕灼华（景甜饰）与沙场沐血折戟、誓为同袍雪冤的战神刘衍（冯绍峰饰）彼此救赎、相知相爱，携手守家卫国的故事。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 去湘当有味的地方
programme.desc: 汪涵作为大哥带领沈梦辰、吴泽林网罗全省美食，借此展现14个市州丰富多元的湘菜味道，透过美食背后的故事，展现湖南各地独特的乡情烟火气。

programme.title: 夜限照相馆
programme.desc: 剧情讲述只为逝者存在的鬼客专门照相馆的刻薄摄影师徐奇周（周元饰）和热血的律师韩春（权娜拉饰）与阴森森的夜客们来往于生死之间惊险又奇妙的故事。

programme.title: 夜限照相馆

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 灼灼风流
programme.desc: 讲述了心存凌云之志、一心考取功名的女官慕灼华（景甜饰）与沙场沐血折戟、誓为同袍雪冤的战神刘衍（冯绍峰饰）彼此救赎、相知相爱，携手守家卫国的故事。

programme.title: 灼灼风流
programme.desc: 讲述了心存凌云之志、一心考取功名的女官慕灼华（景甜饰）与沙场沐血折戟、誓为同袍雪冤的战神刘衍（冯绍峰饰）彼此救赎、相知相爱，携手守家卫国的故事。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 卫斯理蓝血人
programme.desc: 联合国外星生物分析局成员卫斯理在调查神秘蓝色人骨时，重遇拥有蓝色血液的外星女子方天涯，并卷入外星势力的追捕与冲突之中。在生死交锋与逃亡过程中，两人逐渐建立深厚情感，同时揭开一场关乎外星秘密与命运的惊人真相。

programme.title: 综艺大热门
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 迷网
programme.desc: 高级督察司徒忠隶属网络安全及科技罪案调查科。他与刚毕业的见习督察萧美婷一起联手破获各种网络诈骗案的同时，不知不觉中互生好感。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 还原神之食
programme.desc: 文学作品中的虚构菜式，大家可有推想过是甚么味道？主持请来星级厨师，从电视剧集、电玩游戏、卡通动画、文学名著中寻找创意灵感，发掘内里提到的一些特色美食，并透过名厨的巧手，将这些看似不真实的菜式「还原」。

programme.title: 大梦想家
programme.desc: 主持谭凯萤游走台湾各地，深入市区黄金地段、新市镇发展潜力区域，探寻气派不凡的豪宅别墅与特色家居，细看《大梦想家》！移居台湾的港人，如何实现置业与创业梦想？多位「梦想家」分享当地的买楼故事与生活指南。

programme.title: 周六聊Teen谷
programme.desc: 踏入科技年代，青少年对新兴电子产品、网络流行媒体尤感兴趣，追上时代步伐，已成新世代指标！主持陈星妤、陈懿德、王菲用尽所能搜罗世界各地至潮、至新情报，上至世界盛事、医学百科、文艺与科技；下至日常生活、网络热搜，跟观众一一分享。

programme.title: 中年好声音4
programme.desc: 《中年好声音4》为35岁以上热爱歌唱的人士提供舞台，鼓励他们勇敢追梦。本季扩大全球招募，覆盖粤港澳大湾区、北美、新加坡、马来西亚、澳洲等地，吸引更多来自不同背景的中年参赛者以歌声讲述自己的故事。

programme.title: 一周星星
programme.desc: 访谈节目《一周星星》，每集邀请星级艺人、界别名人，与区永权、许文轩、王镇泉等娱乐主播，分享新近工作企划，谈论电影、电视、演唱会相关的特别话题，尤其是网民与圈中朋友关心热议的人和事！

programme.title: 还原神之食
programme.desc: 文学作品中的虚构菜式，大家可有推想过是甚么味道？主持请来星级厨师，从电视剧集、电玩游戏、卡通动画、文学名著中寻找创意灵感，发掘内里提到的一些特色美食，并透过名厨的巧手，将这些看似不真实的菜式「还原」。

programme.title: 不可能任务
programme.desc: 动作特技演员于拍摄背后的辛酸，观众知道多少？星级动作指导钱嘉乐、荷里活动作导演林迪安致力推动薪火相传，培育队长张振朗、队员戴祖仪、孔德贤、刘颂鹏等，从基本功学起，再挑战爆破、飘移等高难度动作。

programme.title: 周六聊Teen谷
programme.desc: 踏入科技年代，青少年对新兴电子产品、网络流行媒体尤感兴趣，追上时代步伐，已成新世代指标！主持陈星妤、陈懿德、王菲用尽所能搜罗世界各地至潮、至新情报，上至世界盛事、医学百科、文艺与科技；下至日常生活、网络热搜，跟观众一一分享。

programme.title: 港生活．港享受
programme.desc: 香港人生活多姿多采，《港生活．港享受》既呈献高贵典雅的品味生活，也会带来贴地亲民的优质享受。节目结合多元化主题，每集探索不同范畴，并请来各行各业的精英分享成功之道。

programme.title: 六点半新闻报导
programme.desc: 翡翠台每日下午六点半，报导本地、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 新闻透视
programme.desc: 《新闻透视》，每周专题报道多段香港以至国际的瞩目新闻，聚焦港人最关心的民生话题，并邀请各界人士、学者、专家，一同深入探讨个中来龙去脉。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 退休有乜计
programme.desc: 《退休有乜计》探讨香港人如何为安稳、有意义的退休生活做好准备。节目通过真实个案、专家访谈和理财建议，分析退休究竟需要多少积蓄，强积金及其他储蓄工具的角色，并讨论六十岁后兼职工作究竟是无奈之举还是个人选择。

programme.title: 唱钱
programme.desc: 挑战音域的极限、拍子的精准，全新互动音乐游戏节目《唱钱》由森美、Eric Kwok、李茵彤任主持，以专业音准分析系统考验参赛者。九宫格代表九个难度等级，参赛者每当连成一线「过三关」，可选择提款离场、继续挑战，甚至是最难的Monster关卡。

programme.title: 谭辉智 X 罗启豪 下一站红馆
programme.desc: 《J Music》致力打造高质音乐平台，一众歌手有展示音乐实力的机会之余，也可让乐迷更深入了解歌手的音乐故事。节目邀请「人气」歌手担任嘉宾，由嘉宾亲自挑选其喜欢的新旧作品，并即场演唱，分享喜爱曲目。

programme.title: 直播灵接触 & A.I.灵接触
programme.desc: 《直播灵接触》载誉归来，第二季继续由「鬼王」梁思浩带领主持拍档黄耀英、黄紫恩，以及小编黄滢仴、汤之欣，为观众带来更多惊吓与惊喜。每集锁定不同灵异主题，诚邀「重量级」嘉宾讲鬼故，揭开法科风俗与行业秘闻。

programme.title: Round 5 - North Melbourne v Brisbane Lions
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Round 5 - Sydney Swans v Gold Coast Suns
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Round 5 - Hawthorn v Western Bulldogs
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: The Pace Race
programme.desc: The '80s saw the rise of the legendary fast bowler. Australia cruised into the decade fielding two lethal pacemen, while the West Indies blasted onto the scene with a quartet of very cool and very fast deadly bowling weapons.

programme.title: Celtic Waves - Ireland
programme.desc: Ireland isn't known for being one of the world's hottest surfing destinations. But in winter surfers head to the village of Mullaghmore, braving the freezing North Atlantic to take on waves as big as multi-storey buildings.

programme.title: The World This Week (2026)
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: Portrait Artist Of The Year S1
programme.desc: In the final heat, nine artists from across Australia have just four hours to create portraits of Muster Dogs Season 1 winner Frank Finger and his dog Annie, actor Chloe Hayden and comedian Alex Lee.

programme.title: Asia News Week (2026)
programme.desc: Yvonne Yong brings you a weekly roundup of the stories making news across the Asia region, plus what's trending on social media and making an impact on the culture and the way people live.

programme.title: 蜀山传
programme.desc: 峨眉派弟子玄天宗奉师命下山，联合昆仑派掌门孤月大师及各大门派，对抗企图统治天下的邪恶力量幽泉血魔。随着正邪大战一触即发，玄天宗在守护苍生的同时，也面对昔日情感与信念的考验。在正义与牺牲之间，众人必须放下执念，合力迎战这场决定人间命运的终极之战。

programme.title: 你好，星期六
programme.desc: 节目通过新奇多样的环节设置和兼具知识性、趣味性的创意内容，深度展现明星艺能。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 灼灼风流
programme.desc: 讲述了心存凌云之志、一心考取功名的女官慕灼华（景甜饰）与沙场沐血折戟、誓为同袍雪冤的战神刘衍（冯绍峰饰）彼此救赎、相知相爱，携手守家卫国的故事。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 去湘当有味的地方
programme.desc: 汪涵作为大哥带领沈梦辰、吴泽林网罗全省美食，借此展现14个市州丰富多元的湘菜味道，透过美食背后的故事，展现湖南各地独特的乡情烟火气。

programme.title: 卫斯理蓝血人
programme.desc: 联合国外星生物分析局成员卫斯理在调查神秘蓝色人骨时，重遇拥有蓝色血液的外星女子方天涯，并卷入外星势力的追捕与冲突之中。在生死交锋与逃亡过程中，两人逐渐建立深厚情感，同时揭开一场关乎外星秘密与命运的惊人真相。

programme.title: 综艺大热门
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: Falonda Simpson And Davonda Washington
programme.desc: A quiet Mississippi summer night is shattered by a 911 call reporting a brutal double murder-but as investigators dig deeper, the grieving husband who found the bodies becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Horror In Starkville Mississippi
programme.desc: When Betty Jones, 65, and Kathryn Crigler, 81, are brutally attacked in a 1990 home invasion, the tiny community of Starkville, MS, is left living in fear.

programme.title: One Shot
programme.desc: After a man is shot dead, pathologist Dr. Antoine Wrice works with investigators to interpret unusual evidence found on the scene and unwind the complex case that could be more than a typical homicide.

programme.title: Toxic Love
programme.desc: Tales of toxic love triangles-wives who stray from their husbands with disastrous results, a deadly case of online catfishing, and a lonely young woman who has an affair with a killer.

programme.title: Golf Streaker
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country. A man streaks across a golf course, delaying a tournament. A dead fish is eerily placed on the front porch of a house; and more.

programme.title: Raw Chicken Chase
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a woman turns shoplifting into a game of chance; a clumsy burglar botches a robbery attempt; and more!

programme.title: Lovers, Lies And Canyon Murder
programme.desc: In 1987 Carol Murphy, 28, is found by hikers slain in a wooded area of Lefthand Canyon, CO. Police uncover a turbulent love life and plenty of suspects in this Western enclave.

programme.title: Death Downstream
programme.desc: When the battered body of Shawna Yandell, 16, is found floating in Washington State's Yakima River in 1993, detectives first suspect those closest to her.

programme.title: DUI, I, I Don’t Belong Here
programme.desc: A man charged with his fourth DUI rages against the machine, and a mom, who's a first-time arrestee, contemplates life as a possible convicted felon. In Modesto, a man is accused of felony arson.

programme.title: Kids Who Kill - Kim Edwards & Lucas Markham
programme.desc: Kim Edwards and Lucas Markham were both outsiders from troubled homes. They felt they understood each other when no one else did. Together they made a plan to get rid of the mum and sister Kim resented.
A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An angry defendant flips off the judge during a virtual hearing; a victim is cross-examined by her accused attacker; and more.

A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An accused stalker screams expletives at the judge; a shooting victim's mother cries for justice; an assistant prosecutor argues with the judge; and more.

programme.title: Friends And Enemies
programme.desc: When three people are gunned down in a Tulsa home, detectives face two suspects, and a web of lies. Prosecutors are left with circumstantial evidence to clinch the case against a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Murder On Maiden Lane
programme.desc: In Atlanta, when a young father is gunned down, a rookie homicide detective draws from her own experience losing a family member to murder to track down his killers.

programme.title: Neighbor Killer Or Family Defender?
programme.desc: When a veteran and his young family are confronted by an angry neighbour, harsh words escalate to a fatal shooting. Is the accused an enraged murderer or a family defender?

programme.title: Hunted On The Highway
programme.desc: In Mobile, two men are killed after their car is sprayed with bullets on the highway, leading detectives across the country in search of answers.

programme.title: Staircase Shooter Or Defensive Dad?
programme.desc: An angry confrontation leads to a 31-year-old father facing life behind bars after shooting his ex-girlfriend's boyfriend in the leg. He insists he was defending his ex and their child from an intruder.

programme.title: Beach Scanner / Tidy / Pets
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach. // Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin. // Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: The Blaze Family
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are spending the day with some very special trucks: Blaze's family! His Mom, Dad, and little sister Sparkle join Blaze in a race against Crusher to prove they're the world's fastest family!

programme.title: Video Game Heroes
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are super excited to play their new video game. But when a video game wizard makes the game come alive, Blaze and AJ must level up and save Axle City from pixel pandemonium

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Hotel / The Crew Builds A Hiking Trail
programme.desc: Builder Cove gets its first hotel when Farmer Zoe's cousin Hadley comes to visit. But will Hadley approve of the new hotel?// After a hiking trail mix-up confuses everyone going to Mr. Ducky-Doo's birthday party, the pups help them get back on track.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Kangaroo Safari / The Crew Plays In The Construction Games
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a kangaroo safari for Lucas and Lily right in the Bark Yard... until their construction kangaroo hops away! // Speed Meister challenges Rubble & Crew to compete in the ultimate build-off: Builder Cove's first Construction Games!

programme.title: Pups Save a Melon Festival / Pups Save A Cow
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's plan to win the giant melon contest goes off the rails when his "melon" bounces away, causing chaos all over town! // When Farmer Al's truck gets stuck on a broken bridge, it's up to the pups to lower them to safety!

programme.title: Pups Save the Honey / Pups Save Mayor Goodway's Purse
programme.desc: Yumi's Yummy Honey is all the buzz when it - and her beehive - go missing from her farm! // Mayor Goodway's purse has disappeared! Along with its precious cargo - Chickaletta!

programme.title: Run Cynthia Run / Dora In Space
programme.desc: Dora and Boots get help from Carmelo the Condor to fix their friend's running shoes in time for the rainforest race! // Dora and Boots rescue Tico from space after his spaceship falls apart!

programme.title: Gaucho Games
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help their friend Catalina the Condor become an amazing Gaucha and save the Gaucho Games!

programme.title: Super Dad
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: Cookies
programme.desc: Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him.

programme.title: School Play
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends take part in a school play about Little Red Riding Hood, but Pedro Pony is nervous to be on the stage.

programme.title: Polly's Holiday
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa's pet, Polly Parrot comes to stay. Peppa and George love Polly Parrot. She is very funny and repeats everything anyone says. When Polly flies away, no one knows how to get her back, until George comes up with a very clever plan.

programme.title: Windy Autumn Day
programme.desc: It is a cold and windy day. At the park, all the leaves have turned red and yellow. It is so windy that Peppa's ball blows into the pond and George's hat blows into a tree.

programme.title: Mysteries
programme.desc: The family is watching "Detective Potato" on TV. Peppa and George want to be detectives too. So,Daddy Pig gives them a mystery to solve. Teddy is hidden and Peppa and George use a magnifying glass to follow a trail of cake crumbs to solve the mystery

programme.title: Mister Skinnylegs
programme.desc: George finds a spider in the bathroom sink, but Peppa is really frightened-until she realizes that it doesn't want to hurt her.

programme.title: Grandpa Pig's Boat
programme.desc: Peppa and George go for a ride in Grandpa Pig's boat. Danny Dog and Granddad Dog are also out sailing. Grandpa Pig and Granddad Dog race their boats to see which is fastest.

programme.title: Shopping
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the grocery store for some tomatoes, spaghetti, onions and fruit, but Daddy Pig gets some chocolate cake for the kids.

programme.title: My Birthday Party
programme.desc: It is Peppa's birthday, and Peppa has a party.

programme.title: Daddy's Movie Camera
programme.desc: Daddy gets a new video camera. First, Peppa shows him how to work it, and then he records Peppa being silly.

programme.title: Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: Buzzy Croc / Dream House
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile worries he'll be caught between his old best friend Buzzy and his new best friend Daisy. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile's simple treehouse gets complicated when they try to add space for all their friends.

programme.title: The Garbage Truck Challenge
programme.desc: Garbage Truck Blaze is competing in the ultimate trash-themed race: the Garbage Truck Challenge! But Garbage Truck Crusher is also in the race, and he'll do anything to crush the competition. Who will come out on top in this dump truck duel?

programme.title: Monster Machine Rescue Team
programme.desc: Blaze must complete three amazing rescues to join the greatest emergency vehicle team in Axle City: the Monster Machine Rescue Team!

programme.title: The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Tunnel
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: Pups Save the Snowshoeing Goodways / Pups Save a Duck Pond
programme.desc: When Mayor Goodway and the twins are late getting back from a snowshoeing, Jake and Everest call the Paw Patrol to search for them. // Water in the duck pond mysteriously drains out, it's up to the PAW Patrol find out what's happening!

programme.title: Rocky Saves Himself / Pups and the Mystery of the Driverless Snocat
programme.desc: Rocky must rescue himself when he has been stranded on an Island full of trash by Humdinger. // Daring Danny's new remote control accidentally takes control of Everest's SnoCat and all the vehicles in Adventure Bay!

programme.title: Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: Barbazoo Can't Say ''No'' / The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: Toy / Astrofools / Mole
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: Explorer / Happy Parky / Storm
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Mascota Mobile / Kite Festival
programme.desc: Dora is about to give her pets a bath when the pet-washing truck goes haywire, and she has to save pets throughout the rainforest! // Dora and Boots save a mouse in time for him to show off his giant kite at the Rainforest Kite Festival.

programme.title: Dora's Mermaid Adventure / Mermazing Surprise
programme.desc: Dora and Boots become mermaids and help Marisol the Mermaid save her home, Sirena Sea! // Dora and Boots go across the sea to help their dolphin friend find the best gift ever, a magic jewel!

programme.title: Fruit
programme.desc: It is fruit day at the supermarket, and Miss Rabbit is making fruit smoothies. Everyone is picking their favourite fruits to blend. George gets a special 'dinosaur' juice, to make him big and strong. Roar!

programme.title: George's Balloon
programme.desc: George is finding it difficult to keep hold of his big balloon. Can anyone stop it from flying off to the moon?

programme.title: Pirate Treasure
programme.desc: Pirate Peppa and friends put together a chest of treasure and bury it in a marked spot. Soon Pedro needs to follow the trail as he realises he has lost something.

programme.title: Grampy Rabbit in Space
programme.desc: Grampy Rabbit visits Peppa's playgroup to talk about space rockets. The talk is going very well until suddenly Grampy Rabbit looses his voice. Can Doctor Brown Bear get him talking again?

programme.title: Peppa's Circus
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig has put up a tent in his garden. Peppa and her friends decide it's a perfect place to put on a circus. With Peppa as the ringmaster, the show can begin!

programme.title: The Fish Pond
programme.desc: Daddy Pig takes Peppa and George to see a fish pond he used to visit when he was a little piggy. He is a little surprised to learn that a few things have changed since then.

programme.title: The Olden Days
programme.desc: Mummy Pig shows Peppa and her friend Suzy Sheep old photographs from when they were babies. Peppa and Suzy don't remember being that young but are pleased to see that they've always been best friends.

programme.title: Sneezing Cold
programme.desc: Gabby, Blaze and AJ are out in the wilderness when they get a call, Blaze's friends have come down with a sickness called the Sneezles! Our heroes must race back to Axle City to bring the sick trucks the medicine oil they need.

programme.title: Pups Save the Diving Bell / Pups Save the Beavers
programme.desc: While the Turbots are deep sea diving, their diving bell ends up stuck! PAW Patrol to the rescue! // A storm washes away a beaver's dam, so he chomps all the wood at Farmer Yumi's! The PAW Patrol arrives to help rebuild his home!

programme.title: Pups Save a Manatee
programme.desc: Farmer Al and Farmer Yumi need help from the PAW Patrol to a get a manatee to the swamp.

programme.title: The Crew Builds Mr. Ducky-Doo A Special Diving Board / The Crew Builds A Rainwater Tank
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Post Office
programme.desc: Builder Cove needs a post office! But when construction gets squirrely, it's up to the pups to find a construction solution.

programme.title: Tiny Croc / Camping Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile find a tiny lizard who wants to be just like Mr. Crocodile. // Winston tries to be the leader on a nature hike, but his high-tech gadget gets everyone lost in the woods.

programme.title: Let Justice Be done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: The Biodisaster
programme.desc: Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: Shooting Star
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid.

programme.title: Ball
programme.desc: // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom.

programme.title: Balloon
programme.desc: Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: Present
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma.

programme.title: Grandpa Pig's Greenhouse
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig and Grandpa Dog are showing and sharing their lovely, tomato filled, Greenhouses to Peppa and George.

programme.title: Sailing Boat
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig is taking Peppa and George sailing, but they keep getting stuck in the mud!

programme.title: Masks
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle has got another task for the children; making masks!

programme.title: Molly Mole
programme.desc: It is Molly Mole's first day at school and she quickly makes best friends with Peppa and Rebecca Rabbit.

programme.title: George's Wooly Hat
programme.desc: George has a new hat and Mummy Pig is determined that George doesn't get it muddy when visiting Grandpa and Granny Pig.

programme.title: Canal Boat
programme.desc: It's Captain Daddy Dog's birthday and Mummy Dog surprises him with the gift of a boat trip, which isn't quite what he expected.

programme.title: One Last For The Road / The Little Critters
programme.desc: The Barbababies love bedtime stories, except if they are always the same... // Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: The Mountain Eater
programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf.

programme.title: Dino Smash!
programme.desc: When Zeg floats away on a kite, Blaze must team up with Zeg's three sisters to rescue him! "Meg, Peg, and Egg... save Zeg!"

programme.title: Pups Great Race / Pups Take the Cake
programme.desc: It's Race Day and the pups are about to race each other across the town to see who is the fastest. // Mr. Porter enters a cake competition and needs Ryder and the pups to help him. The race is on to get the cake baked and to the competition on time!

programme.title: Pups Save a Wild Ride
programme.desc: Alex and Daring Danny X are snowboarding right for Risky Ridge and need help from the PAW Patrol.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Playground / The Crew Fixes A Roof
programme.desc: After Speed Meister builds an unsafe playground, the Rubble & Crew get creative and build a whole new one with old materials. // The town Chili Cookaroo is threatened when City Hall's roof starts to cave in! Luckily, the pups know just how to fix it.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Car Wash / The Crew Plans Grandpa Day
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs her muddy motorcycle cleaned fast! Wheeler and the pups jump into action to build a solution before the big race. // It's Grandpa Gravel's special day! But when the pups are needed, they have to change their Grandpa Day plans.

programme.title: Captain Dora / Bruno And The Bunny Boyz
programme.desc: Dora and Boots track down the Pirate Piggies' ship and save it from a kraken! // Dora and Boots help Bruno the Bunny find his own special dance moves in time to perform with his favorite band, the Bunny Boyz!

programme.title: The Missing Magical Instruments / Mr. Banana's Big Puppet Show
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Vicky the Vicuna track down missing magic instruments to save Cloud Kingdom! // Dora rescues Boots' special banana puppet before the Golden Monkeys can get to it!

programme.title: Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: Living Together / Holey The Snowman
programme.desc: For the very first time, the Barbababies will take the train and sleep in a hotel. // Barbouille crafted a magnificent snowman that the children named Bobo.

programme.title: The Mountain Eater / The First Day Of School
programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Skate Park / The Crew Builds A Tunnel
programme.desc: The Crew has a mishap while building a skatepark. // The Crew helps a pop star get her tour bus to town.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Beaver Home / The Crew Fixes A Road
programme.desc: The power is out in Builder Cove! When the pups find out a beaver is to blame, they've got to build him a new home to bring the power back. // When Speed Meister damages the road ahead of the town helper parade, the pups work fast to repave the way.

programme.title: Skye's Road Trip Rescue
programme.desc: Skye, Liberty and Everest head off on a road trip in a cool new RV. But when a baby moose, rabbit and bear go missing.

programme.title: Pups Save the Space Kitties / Pups Save the Sea Sponges
programme.desc: Humdinger puts on cat costume, the Alien Kid mistakes him for a real kitty in need of a home. // After a tiring deep-sea dive, Zuma dozes off and dreams.

programme.title: Barbazoo Can't Say ''No'' / The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: Super Dad
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: Cookies
programme.desc: Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him.

programme.title: The Crew Builds An Art Museum / The Crew Builds A Giant Alphorn
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the perfect place to show off River's ever-changing photography projects... Builder Cove's own art museum! // Farmer Zoe has a new goat on her farm! But when she can't find the singing goat, the pups team up with Park Ranger Rose.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Skyscraper
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are building their biggest construction project ever... a skyscraper! And a job that huge calls for brand-new, mega-sized construction vehicles! But when Speed Meister sees the pups' big trucks, he calls in help from his big brother.

programme.title: Learning To Fly / Queen Swiper
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Dulce the Dragon learn to fly so she can reach her parents at Cloudy Caves. // After La Reina and Swiper's bodies were switched by Big Red Chicken's magic, Dora and Boots help them switch back!

programme.title: Breaking the Ice
programme.desc: When a little bunny gets trapped on top of a melting glacier, Blaze must put his new robot powers to the test as he races to the rescue.

programme.title: Pretend Friend / Croc Outta Water
programme.desc: When Winston won't play with Lydia, Daisy and Mr. Crocodile create an imaginary friend for her. // Mr. Crocodile helps Daisy fish-sit for Martin, but worries he won't be able to stop himself from eating it.

programme.title: One Last For The Road / The Little Critters
programme.desc: The Barbababies love bedtime stories, except if they are always the same... // Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: Barbazoo's Diary / The Great Reporter
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: Roadtrip / Tickets / Talent Show
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World // Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket // Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: The Treat Thief
programme.desc: Officer Blaze just got his biggest case yet: tracking down the mischievous Treat Thief! With help from Officer Anna, Blaze sets out to stop the thief and recover every stolen treat!

programme.title: The Race Around the Earth
programme.desc: In their biggest race ever, Blaze and AJ go head-to-head against Crusher to race all the way around the Earth and win the World's Biggest Trophy!

programme.title: The Crew And Rocky Build A Bear Island
programme.desc: Rocky visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay just in time to see Builder Cove's new baby bear! But when Park Ranger Rose asks for construction help, Speed Meister accidentally ruins the bears' home. It's up to all the pups and Rocky to save the day!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Rooftop Stage / The Crew Fixes The Lighthouse
programme.desc: When Grocer Gabriel and Sierra Sparkle both need construction help before Banana Day, Rubble & Crew has their paws full. // Speed Meister shines his face in the sky with the lighthouse! But when a ship needs that light, the pups jump into action.

programme.title: Pups and the Stinky Bubble Trouble / Pups Save the Baby Ostriches
programme.desc: What's that smell? A strange odor is chasing the jungle animals away from their homes. // Olivia the Ostrich has fallen in to the canyon! The pups need to work together to lift her to safety, while keeping her soon-to-hatch eggs warm.

programme.title: Pups Save Gustavo's Guitar / Pups Save the Yoga Goats
programme.desc: Gustavo Goodway's guitar is missing. The pups need to find it before tonight's campfire concert! // Farmer Yumi's new Yoga Goat class is a hit, until her goats go missing! It's up to the Paw Patrol to find the goats and return them to Yumi's farm.

programme.title: Backpack's Charm / Lost Banana Blankie
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Backpack find her lost friendship charm and make it even better than before! // Dora helps Boots find his lost banana blankie before it's bedtime at the sleepover party!

programme.title: Princesa Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Pilar the Princess Unicorn and help her get back to Unicorn Land!

programme.title: Beach Scanner
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach.

programme.title: Tidy
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Emily Elephant
programme.desc: There's a new pupil at the playgroup, Emily Elephant. Everybody wants to be her friend because she is very good at building blocks and can make a loud noise with her trunk.

programme.title: George's Friend
programme.desc: George and Rebecca Rabbit's little brother Richard each have a toy dinosaur but they are not very good at sharing their toys. Mummy Pig shows them that they can have much more fun at the playground if they play together, just like their big sisters.

programme.title: The Boat Pond
programme.desc: Peppa and her family and friends are playing at the pond with their toy boats. Everyone has a boat to play with except Rebecca Rabbit. Daddy Pig makes Rebecca a boat out of newspaper. Rebecca's paper boat is so nice; everyone wants one.

programme.title: Mr Scarecrow
programme.desc: The birds keep eating the seeds from Grandpa Pig's flower garden. Peppa and George make a scarecrow, which stops the birds from eating. But Peppa is worried that the birds are hungry, so Granny Pig gives the birdies a birdfeeder with their own seeds.

programme.title: Bubbles
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing with bubbles. When the bubble mixture runs out, Daddy Pig shows them how to make really big bubbles with an old tennis racket and soapy water. Then he makes a big, muddy, bubbly puddle for everyone to jump up and down in.

programme.title: Bedtime
programme.desc: It's nearly time for bed and Peppa and George are called in for their bath. After that, they brush their teeth and get into bed. Soon they are fast asleep. Mummy and Daddy Pig finally sit down, but it's been a long day and they are very sleepy too.

programme.title: The Traffic Jam
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig have invited Peppa and her family to lunch. On the way, Peppa, George, Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig get caught in a very long traffic jam, so Grandpa Pig decides to bring the lunch to them.

programme.title: Rock Pools
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig take Peppa and George to a beach with lots of rocks and little rock pools to explore. They all have fun with a little crab, a seashell and a fossil. Peppa rescues a little fish in her bucket and puts it back in the sea.

programme.title: Teddy's Day Out
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are having a picnic. Mr Zebra the Postman and Zoe Zebra are having a picnic too, so they decide to have one big picnic. When it's home time, Peppa leaves her teddy behind.

programme.title: Vandal! / Tumbles, Where Did You Go?
programme.desc: Barbidur catches a mysterious masked vandal. // Tototutu, Barbidur's favorite little car, has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: Tooth On The Loose / Scaredy Croc
programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: Tire Trouble
programme.desc: Blaze and his pals are gearing up for a big race with brand new tires! But when Crusher tricks Starla, Darington and Stripes into putting on out-of-control SILLY tires, it's up to Blaze to rescue them and beat Crusher to the finish line!

programme.title: Tool Truck Blaze
programme.desc: When three construction emergencies break out all over town, Blaze must save the day by becoming: Tool Truck Blaze! With a toolbox full of amazing tools, Blaze is ready to hammer, drill and saw through any obstacle in his way! Tool Truck Power!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Mega Stunt Ramp / The Crew Builds A Solar Farm
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew use their giant trucks to make awesome stunt ramps when Speed Meister challenges Mayor Greatway to a stunt competition // When power problems shut down Sierra Sparkle's show, the pups hop in their big vehicles to turn the power back on.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Bridge
programme.desc: Rubble and his construction pup family gear up to build a bridge, only to find the villainous Speed Meister has a different idea. It's up to Rubble & Crew to work together and save the day by building a new, safe bridge to Builder Cove.

programme.title: Pups Save a Cuckoo Clock / Pups Save Ms. Marjorie's House
programme.desc: Jake's family cuckoo clock and is sliding down the mountainside with Chickaletta stuck inside! Ryder calls on Everest to help the pups to save the day! // Mysterious holes are appearing all over Ms. Marjorie's yard.

programme.title: Pups Rescue Thanksgiving / Pups Save a Windy Bay
programme.desc: The bouncy turkey from the Thanksgiving feast at City Hall has flown away with Humdinger and his kittens! // A super-strong wind has suddenly swept up all the surfers in the Adventure Bay Windsurfing Race.

programme.title: Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: The Seven Foods / The Perfect Portrait
programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.title: Super Dad / Time Out / Cookies
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar // Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas // Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him

programme.title: Beach Scanner / Tidy / Pets
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach. // Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin. // Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Octo-Swiper / Tudos Juntos
programme.desc: Dora stops a frantic octopus Swiper and saves the Pearl Day Party! // Dora meets Raquel the Rock Lobster and helps her get the missing instruments back in time to play at the big music show!

programme.title: Volleybull! / Diferente es Excelente
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny perfect a new move in time for the championship volleyball game! // Dora and Boots run into Dulce the dragon on her way to the first day of school and show her that everyone's differences are what make them excellent!

programme.title: Snowy Mountain
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are on Snowy Mountain learning how to ski. Their teacher, Madame Gazelle is very good at skiing and was once a world champion! But in the end it is Mummy Pig who impresses everyone...

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig take Peppa and George on a visit to a castle!

programme.title: Parachute Jump
programme.desc: The school roof is leaking so Mummy Pig does a parachute jump to raise money to fix it!

programme.title: Gerald Giraffe
programme.desc: Gerald Giraffe makes friends on his first day at playgroup.

programme.title: Miss Rabbit's Taxi
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit spends the day picking people up and dropping people off in her job as taxi driver.

programme.title: Playing Pretend
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends learn how to play games of pretend.

programme.title: Scooters
programme.desc: Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig discover how fun scooters are.

programme.title: Robot Power
programme.desc: When Crusher unleashes three of his most destructive creations on Axle City, there's only one hero strong enough to save the day: Robot Blaze!

programme.title: Pups Save a Ghost / Pups Save a Show
programme.desc: When a mysterious ghost is causing havoc around the Lookout,The pups discover it's not a ghost at all - it's Marshall... sleepwalking! // Before the big play, a stage prop collapses and traps Cap'n Turbot. Pups to the rescue!

programme.title: Pups Save Breakfast

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。
